zombies.name: Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Zombie hates how his name makes him seem like an ordinary, well, zombie. He doesn't think of himself as some unnamed enemy or just another common corpse. He's an individual, damn it! And he's going to do something extraordinary, even if it kills you.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Regular Garden-variety zombie.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>50/0.5 (biting)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270</color>

zombies.name: Flag Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Make nay mistake, Flag Zombie loves brains but somewhere down th' line he also picked up a fascination with flags. Maybe it's because th' flags always have brains on them. Hard to say.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Flag Zombie marks th' arrival of a huge pile or "wave" of zombies.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Only appears in flag waves by default, slightly faster than regular Zombies. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color>

zombies.name: Conehead Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Conehead Zombie has nay clue what a traffic cone is. Thundering typhoons! To him, it looks like an ice cream cone, and when he finds out it can't eat it, he just sticks it on his head.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>His traffic cone headpiece makes him twice as tough as normal zombies.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 370 (Type 1)</color>

zombies.name: Pole Vaulting Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once th' best high jumper in his town, Pole Vaulting Zombie's career took a turn th' day he forgot to set up th' cushions behind th' high jump stand. Shiver me timbers! Thundering typhoons!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Pole Vaulting Zombie vaults with a pole. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Jumps over th' first plant he runs into. Can be blocked by tall plants.</color>

zombies.name: Buckethead Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once upon a time, Buckethead Zombie, who was merely a painter, was hailed as a genius among zombies for his creative use of a bucket. Years have passed, and now th' zombies wonder if he still has some secret killer tricks up his sleeve. Arrr! Cleave him to the brisket! Be he running out of ideas, or be he hiding something? Who knows?</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>His bucket hat makes him extremely resistant to damage.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1100 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Bucket can be removed by Magnet-shrooms.</color>

zombies.name: Newspaper Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"You can't fault him for being frustrated; he was just about to finish th' crossword puzzle (vertical word number 23 be 'Brains'), which explains why he was holding th' paper upside down."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>His newspaper provides limited defense.

<color=black>Toughness: Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 200 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Travels normally at first, but speeds up after losing his newspaper (movement speed ×2.5, attack speed ×1.5).</color>

zombies.name: Dancing Pole Vaulter
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dancing Pole Vaulter's athletic skills be average by zombie standards. On th' advice of th' Backup Pole Vaulters, he decided to pursue th' idol path. Now, his pop shanty "Just Brains," a collaboration with Michael Jackson, be becoming a hit. Thar she blows!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>After vaulting over, summons his Backup Pole Vaulters.

<color=black>Toughness: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Summons 4 Backup Pole Vaulters after jumping. Does not summon if th' jumping be blocked.</color>

zombies.name: Backup Pole Vaulter
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' four brothers, once troubled orphans, developed twisted personalities and bullied others at th' Zombie Academy. One day, they saw Dancing Pole Vaulter performing joyfully on stage, and it changed them. From that moment, they joined him in performing on stage together.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Climb over a plant.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270</color>
<color=black>Traits: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#4B0082>Jumps over th' first plant he runs into. Can be blocked by tall plants.</color>

zombies.name: Screen Door Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Screen Door Zombie, once an FBI task force member with a bad temper but a righteous heart, never negotiated with robbers—he'd just break down doors to save hostages. After becoming a zombie, his kind heart stayed th' same. When he saw zombies kidnapping a little ghost zombie, he tried to break in, but they coated th' door with glue, trapping his hand.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Can block bullets coming from th' front.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1100 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Screen Door can be removed by Magnet-shrooms. Arrr!</color>

zombies.name: Football Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Football Zombie be a sports star among zombies, admired by many for his heroic presence on th' field. Many companies want to hire him, but his salary demands be steep—an annual pay of 10,000 brains.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Runs super fast.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Football Helmet can be removed by Magnet-shrooms.

zombies.name: Michael Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Black suit, black hat—he's not here for a funeral. He's just a dancer, and ye can call him Michael Zombie.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Leads th' charge with his ultimate dance moves.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Summons 4 Dancing Pole Vaulters at a time, keeps summoning if a Dancing Pole Vaulter dies. Does not summon while eating.</color>

zombies.name: Ducky Tube Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>It takes a certain kind of zombie to be a Ducky Tuber. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Not every zombie can handle it. Some crack. They can't pillage it. Thundering typhoons! They walk away and give up on brains forever.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Can swim in water lanes. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270</color>

zombies.name: Ducky Tube Conehead Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>They say bad students always have fancy stationery, but Ducky Tube Conehead doesn't agree. After all, he refuses to admit he's one of them. Shiver me timbers!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Can swim in water lanes.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 370 (Type 1)</color>

zombies.name: Ducky Tube Buckethead Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ducky Tube Buckethead never wanted to wear that leaky float ring… but what can he do? That rusty bucket on his head isn't exactly waterproof.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Can swim in water lanes.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1100 (Type 1)</color>

zombies.name: Zombarine
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' formidable Zombarine, designed based on bionic principles, be both majestic and intimidating—a coveted war weapon for zombies. "Now we just need to tackle th' issue of seaweed getting tangled in th' propeller," said Dr. Edgar.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Th' zombies' premier vehicle against water plants.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Moves fast and sinks any plant it comes to contact with, dealing 500 Damage to anti-crush plants.

zombies.name: Scholar Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As a leading authority in th' academic realm, Scholar Zombie be frequently seen in th' library. His passion for reading runs deep, and disturbing him while he reads can spark his fury. This barnacle covered gentleman will make sure ye understand th' true meaning of "knowledge be power."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Deals huge damage alongside his sturdy books. Blow me down!

<color=black>Damage: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#4B0082>400</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#4B0082>720 +1100 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Short-term invincibility and increased speed (movement speed ×10, attack speed ×3) after his book be broken. Arrr!</color>

zombies.name: Zomboni
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' zombie driving be an excellent driver, especially considering that few zombies can navigate from th' ice rink to th' grass field. Now, he must go pay th' fine. Th' ice machine he operates isn't a Zamboni; it's a Zomboni produced by Company B. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Th' Zomboni applies ice, steam and pressure to your plants. Sling yer hook! Cleave him to the brisket!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to Chill and Deep Chill.

zombies.name: Snorkel Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Snorkel Zombie may have a broken mask, but that doesn't hinder his ability to dive and float in th' water. His so-called "sinking" isn't due to his diving skills; he simply doesn't require air to breathe.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Snorkel Zombie can swim underwater.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Submerges to avoid straight-firing projectile attacks.</color>

zombies.name: Bobsled Zomboni
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>This car, designed by ski enthusiasts, drives smoothly on snow and ice, even achieving higher speeds than on grass. Unfortunately, it has a flaw: It can only be started on icy surfaces. Blimey!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Only appears when there's ice on th' field.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>2700</color>
<color=black>Traits: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#4B0082>Moves very fast when on top of ice. Immune to Chill and Deep Chill.</color>

zombies.name: Dolphin Rider Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dolphin Rider Zombie be a part-time performer and dolphin keeper at an aquarium. Th' dolphin he rides be a zombie, but unlike typical zombies, this "zombie dolphin" has nay desire for brains. Blow me down!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Dolphin Rider Zombies use dolphins to bypass your defense.

<color=black>Toughness: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Jumps over th' first plant he runs into. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Can be blocked by tall plants.</color>

zombies.name: Trident Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Trident Zombie was originally just a regular javelin thrower who became a fisherman after retiring. However, when he went to th' river to fish, he sank because he couldn't swim. When he came ashore, he realized he had become what he be now.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Throws a trident to attack your plants.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>6-9s after entering or when blocked, throws a trident, causing damage to plants equal to 20% (minimum of 60) of their current HP.</color>
<color=black>Minimum Search Range:</color><color=#4B0082>3.5 Tiles in Front</color>

zombies.name: Diamond-box Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Tonight, Diamond-box Zombies will unveil their dazzling world. Their eyes shine like th' brightest stars in th' night sky, and th' golden light appears to flow like a river through time, illuminating th' uncertain path ahead. Each time th' lid of th' box be gently opened, it feels like unlocking a door to another realm.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Be this.. Savvy? A Conehead Zombie?

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>2000 + 4400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Turns into a Gold-box Zombie upon losing its armor.</color>

zombies.name: Gold-box Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Underneath th' golden box, other boxes in different colors await. Can ye guess what th' box inside be made from?"</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Be this.. A Conehead Zombie?

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>2000 + 2200 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Turns into a Silver-box Zombie upon losing its armor.</color>

zombies.name: Silver-box Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Silver-box Zombie thinks of th' box on his head as a pot, so it must be one. Given his mindset, why don't ye grasp his perspective? And ye do see th' exclamation mark on his box, right?</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Be this.. A Conehead Zombie?

<color=black>Toughness: Dead men tell no tales.</color><color=#4B0082>2000 + 1100 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Shiver me timbers!</color><color=#4B0082>Turns into a Conehead Zombie upon losing its armor.</color>

zombies.name: Jack-in-the-Box Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Although Jack-in-the-Box Zombie be a mental patient, th' circus welcomed his application. Be wary of what's in his toy box; it's sure to scare you. Sling yer hook!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>This zombie carries an explosive surprise.

<color=black>Explosion Damage: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#4B0082>1 Million</color>
<color=black>Explosion Radius:</color><color=#4B0082>1.375 Tiles (≈ 3×3)</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Blow me down!</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Will sometimes explode and insta-kill surrounding plants.</color>

zombies.name: Balloon Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Balloon Zombie, one of th' Zomppelin creators, frequently gets asked why he's tied balloons to himself. His usual reply is, "That was me conclusion." However, th' truth be that th' balloons simply got tangled by chance.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Balloon Zombie floats above th' fray, immune to most attacks. Arrr!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 20 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Cannot be damaged by most plants while flying.</color>

zombies.name: Zomppelin
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Zomppelin, Dr. Edgar's latest creation, be smartly becoming th' zombies' trusted ally. Speculation abounds about who will pilot this powerful weapon—perhaps th' imp or even th' airship itself? "It's just a balloon," Dr. Edgar remarked. Splice the mainbrace! "Zombies need to keep up with th' times. I'm even considering turning it into a drone to avoid embarrassment when defeated by plants."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Drops deadly bombs as it flies over your plants.

<color=black>Bomb Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>500</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Drops Jack-in-the-Box Bombs every 3s to th' plant directly below. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Sling yer hook! Can be pushed back half a tile by Blovers.</color>

zombies.name: Beluga Rider Yeti
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' white whale that Yeti Zombie rides has impressive jumping skills. Dolphin Rider Zombie be quite envious and has always wanted to borrow it for a ride, but Yeti Zombie refuses each time. "Yeti Zombie has nay control over his white whale," Dr. Edgar said. "He always wants to hide behind me, but th' white whale ends up going th' other way."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Jumps forward three tiles and turns back, attacking your plants from behind. Savvy?

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Cannot be blocked by tall plants.</color>

zombies.name: Digger Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A long time ago, Digger Zombies despised Magnet-shrooms for constantly confiscating their tools. Now, they hate Miner Pumpkins even more. "My head keeps getting hit, which makes me feel even worse," he laments.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>This zombie digs to bypass your defenses.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Tunnels underground and appears on th' left side of th' lawn. Vulnerable to Magnet-shrooms and fully-armed Potato Mines.</color>

zombies.name: Bucknut-copter Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Friends, did ye know about th' Berlin airship? It inspired me design..." All th' zombies want to hide from Bucknut-copter Zombie, not only because he talks too much about th' airship, but also because th' noise from his balloon's propeller be unbearable.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Bucknut-copter Zombie be immune to Blovers!

<color=black>Toughness: Blow me down!</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 500 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to Blovers. Arrr! Blow me down! Gains a Type 1 Bucknut Helmet with 2200 Toughness upon touching ground.</color>

zombies.name: Clown-in-the-Box Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>For every clown zombie, self-destruction be th' highest form of art, and Clown-in-the-Box Zombie excels above all. Arrr! "Clown-in-the-Box Zombie will never pillage off his mask or let go of th' gift box in his hand!"</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Clown-in-the-Box Zombie may also explode after his death!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 370 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Becomes violent after exploding, doubling his speed. Upon defeat, has a chance to explode and transform into a Jack-in-the-Box Zombie. Shiver me timbers! Th' longer it be on th' lawn, th' higher th' chance.</color>

zombies.name: Catapult Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Nobody knows how Catapult Zombie manages to throw with such precision, but one thing's for sure—if ye see him, cover your head quickly!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Catapults basketballs to attack your plants.

<color=black>Damage: Arrr!</color><color=#4B0082>60/3s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>850</color>
<color=black>Traits: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#4B0082>Throws basketballs at th' leftmost plant in its lane. When all 25 basketballs be used, moves forward and crushes plants.</color>

zombies.name: Pogo Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sproing! Batten down the hatches! Sproing! Sproing! That's th' sound of a powerful and effective zombie doing what he does best.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A zombie that can leap over your defenses.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Can jump over plants. Th' Pogo Stick can be removed by Magnet-shrooms.</color>

zombies.name: Ladder Zombie
zombies.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Ladder Zombie heard online that with a ladder and some work clothes, he could sneak past any defenses. Armed with a ladder and dressed like a worker, he sets out to conquer th' plant defenses.
Peashooter's comment: "Didn't anyone tell him that his zombie skin be way too noticeable...?"</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>This zombie uses a ladder to bypass obstacles. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 720 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Can use th' ladder to ignore plant defenses. Laddered plants cannot be moved by th' Glove. Ladders can be destroyed by Cremators. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Ladder can be removed by Magnet-shrooms.</color>

zombies.name: Melon Pogo Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Quote: "It's highly unlikely for shells to explode in th' same crater twice! This be what 'Crater Theory' states." Melon Pogo Zombie says while adjusting his melon peel hat. However, nay one told him that his red-and-green color scheme stands out a bit too much in a crowd of zombies. Blow me down!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>This zombie charges up and leaps into your defenses!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 2200 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>If in th' right side of th' lawn, charges up for 5s, then performs a big jump (about 4 Tiles long). Only does this once.
<color=black>Weakness:</color><color=#4B0082>Umbrella Fusions</color>

zombies.name: Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Gargantuar be like a massive, clumsy beast, its size an advantage at th' cost of intelligence. Arrr! It doesn't understand plants or brains; it only knows how to move forward, relentlessly.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A massive, slow-moving zombie that crushes everything in its way with its enormous size.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Throws an Imp upon reaching half health. Deals 500 Damage to anti-crush plants, 50 Damage to Spike Rocks and 1800 Damage to hypnotized zombies each slam.</color>

zombies.name: Giga Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Although th' Giga Gargantuar wreaks havoc on th' battlefield, its blood-red eyes instilling fear in all who face it, there's a little-known secret: Th' monster be perpetually irritable due to chronic sleep deprivation.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Th' enraged Gargantuar crushes everything in its path with terrifying strength.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Inherits all traits from regular Gargantuars.</color>

zombies.name: Imp
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Imps enjoy sneaking through tight spaces, often causing mischief. Don't be surprised if ye see one bouncing around unexpectedly!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Small and sneaky, Imp loves to squeeze into tight spaces, making him agile and harder to target.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>While in th' air, can be flung out of th' screen by th' Ultimate moves from some Umbrella fusions.</color>

zombies.name: Mecha Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A zombie from th' popular Plant Girls vs Zombies.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Another invention by Dr. Gargantuar, full-metal and will stomp on your defenses without hesitation.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to most status effects.
<color=black>•</color>Crushes plants, deals 500 Damage to anti-crush plants and 150 Damage to Spike Rocks. Deals 1000 Damage to hypnotized zombies every second.
<color=black>Weakness:</color><color=#4B0082>Magnet-shroom</color>

zombies.name: Giga Mecha Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A zombie from th' popular Plant Girls vs Zombies.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A latest creation by Dr. Gargantuar, this machinery of doom slowly approaches with steady steps.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Inherits all Traits from regular Mecha Gargantuars.</color>

zombies.name: Mecha-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Mecha-nut Zombie doesn’t have time for small talk—literally. With every turn, crash, and slope-assisted sprint, it’s all about momentum. Cleave him to the brisket! "Gotta keep rolling, gotta keep crushing," it mutters in a tinny, robotic voice, steam hissing from its joints. Plants unlucky enough to be in its path? Flattened. But even machines have limits—when it finally grinds to a halt, th' Imps inside spill out, ready to pick up whar their rolling fortress left off.
zombies.info:
<size=36>A rolling bowling ball on th' zombies' side.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Switches lanes when hitting plants, speeds up on slopes. Slows down after switching lanes.
<color=black>•</color>Crushes plants that has less than or equal to 1000 Toughness, and deals 1000 damage to tougher plants.
<color=black>•</color>Spawns 5 Imps upon death.
<color=black>•</color>Has equal probablities to drop an ice ball, fireball, or Mecha Fragment.
<color=black>•</color>Th' balls can crush plants, block up to 30 bullets, and last 30 seconds. Can be countered by Ice-/Fire-based plant fusions.
<color=black>Weakness:</color><color=#4B0082>Umbrella Fusions</color>

zombies.name: Silver Zombie Statue
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A zombie wrapped in pure silver, sold in th' garden souvenir shop for just two silver coins. "Obviously, th' zombie inside lowers th' value of th' pure silver coating," comments Dr. Edgar Zomboss.
zombies.info:
<size=36>A zombie turned into a silver statue. Arrr!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>200</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immobile. Cannot have damage to itself redirected. Cannot be knocked back by Umbrella ultimates.
<color=black>•</color>Starts to rapidly lose HP 15s after appearance.
<color=black>•</color>Drops 1 Diamond (1k Coins) upon death.</color>

zombies.name: Golden Zombie Statue
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A zombie wrapped in gold. Compared to being sold as a souvenir, it be more popular in th' Golden Egg Smash event. "Smash it open with peas. Thundering typhoons! Common rewards be coins and diamonds, while th' hidden grand prize be a zombie," explains Dr. Edgar Zomboss. So far, nay one has obtained th' hidden grand prize.
zombies.info:
<size=36>A golden zombie statue, a symbol of wealth!

<color=black>Toughness: Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#4B0082>300</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immobile. Cannot have damage to itself redirected. Cannot be knocked back by Umbrella ultimates.
<color=black>•</color>Starts to rapidly lose HP 15s after appearance.
<color=black>•</color>Drops 3 Diamonds (3k Coins) upon death.</color>

zombies.name: Armored Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Armored Gargantuar be a big fan of a skin called 'Cavalier' from his favorite game. Shiver me timbers! So, he spent a fortune custom-ordering a set of medieval armor tailored just for him. However, when he tried to pillage it off, he found it was stuck for good... And that's how he ended up with a permanent 'Cadavelier' skin.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Spawns Imps every time he smashes with his mace!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>8000 + 24000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Moves at half th' speed of regular Gargantuars. Batten down the hatches!
<color=black>•</color>Takes a maximum of 5000 damage per hit before damage reduction calculations.
<color=black>•</color>Immune to being hypnotized, devoured and knocked back, other status effects only last half as long.
<color=black>•</color>Throws a Mecha-nut ball when its Toughness be at half, spawning 5 Imps when it breaks.
<color=black>•</color>Spawns 1-3 Imps every time he slams th' ground with his mace.</color>

zombies.name: Dr. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Zomboss
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Edgar George Zomboss achieved his Doctorate in Thanatology in only two years. Smartly mastering thanatological technology, he built his fearsome Zombot and set about establishing absolute dominance of his local subdivision.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Dr. Zomboss rules them all.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>60000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Drops a trophy upon defeat. Incoming damage be capped at 5000 before reduction. Immune to most status effects, except Chill, Freeze, and Enflamed. Has multiple attack modes:
<color=black>•</color>Deploys regular zombies on th' right half of th' lawn.
<color=black>•</color>Stomps on plants in th' rightmost 4 columns. Blow me down!
<color=black>•</color>Releases rolling ice and fireballs that crush plants in a lane.
<color=black>•</color>Drops 3 Bungee Zombies on th' left half of th' lawn.
<color=black>•</color>At half health, starts to throw campers that crush all plants in a 2x3 area.</color>

zombies.name: Bungee Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Bungee Zombie loves to pillage risks. After all, what's th' point of being dead if ye don't live a little?</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Descends from th' sky and steals a plant. Prioritizes Pumpkins. Cleave him to the brisket!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Weakness:</color><color=#4B0082>Umbrellas</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifier:
</color><color=#4B0082>Gains a 90% damage reduction, and can now drop Ultimate zombies as close as column 4 (excluding Diamond Mystery-boxes and Mini-bosses).</color>

zombies.name: Dr. Zomboss Auric Prime
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. In non consectetur odio, ac consectetur dui. Blisterin' barnacles! Splice the mainbrace!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>I'm watching ye every step of th' way. Blisterin' barnacles!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>60000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Inherits all traits from Dr. Zomboss. Additionally, disables player's gloves and mallet on appearance. Mallet be unlocked at 2/3 health. Gloves be unlocked at 1/3 health. Thrown campers also clears th' conveyor belt.</color>
<size=36>Fusion Recipe:<color=#4B0082>Dr. Zomboss + Trophy</color>

zombies.name: Yeti Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Many details about Yeti Zombie remain shrouded in mystery. His past? Classified. His motives? Unknown. Th' only things on record? His name, birth date, social security number, education, work history… and an unwavering passion for roast beef sandwich sandwiches. Yo ho ho.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Yeti Zombies can sometimes run away.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Freezes plants in a 3x3 area around it. Jalapenos, Torchwoods and Ice-shrooms be immune to this effect. May carry Puzzle pieces in Odyssey: Evolved.</color>

zombies.name: Nian Zombie
zombies.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>To celebrate th' New Year, th' zombie party sends out Nian Zombie, th' embodiment of festive spirit.

"Look at me new clothes! Don't I look just like a lion dancer? Sling yer hook! Pretty nice, right? Now, time to give me New Year's greetings to th' plants!"

Unfortunately for him, th' plants were too polite. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! After a flurry of cheerful "thank yous", Nian Zombie found himself promptly swept away, whether he liked it or not.
zombies.info:
<size=36>Nian Zombies have very heave-ho armor.

<color=black>Toughness: Blimey!</color><color=#4B0082>8888 + 8888 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Weakness:</color><color=#4B0082>Pepper Popper deals 15× Damage to Nian Zombies.</color>

zombies.name: Frost Legion Snowball Launcher
zombies.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>"Snowball fight!" Snowball Launcher Zombie wakes up from his icy slumber, flinging snowballs wildly in every direction.

"Should we tell him?"
"Nah, let's see how long it takes him to figure it out."

SMACK!—Another snowball lands.

"That makes fourteen."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Snowball Launcher Zombie can attack your plants with snowballs and freeze them. Blow me down!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>20/2s</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to Chill and Freeze. Vulnerable to Deep Chill.
<color=black>•</color>After appearing, it will continually launch snowballs at plants, which will deal 20 damage and explode upon impact, disabling plants for 5s in a 3×3 range. Snowballs inflict 10 Cryo points to hypnotized zombies affected.</color>
<color=black>Weakness:</color><color=#4B0082>Umbrella Rind</color>

zombies.name: Frost Legion Shieldbearer
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Frost Legion Shieldbearer was once an elite soldier on th' battlefield. Shiver me timbers! Now retired, he’s th' reigning champion of th' graveyard snowball fight tournament. Arrr! He treasures th' shield that brought him so much glory, constantly checking it for scratches—though some say that very habit might be what got him injured and retired in th' first place.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A shieldbearer from th' snowy plains, he deflects straight-firing projectiles and returns them as snowballs.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 2200 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to Chill and Freeze. Vulnerable to Deep Chill.
<color=black>•</color>Raises shield every 1.5s to reflect straight-firing projectiles as snowballs. Takes 20 damage when reflecting and does not block th' projectile. Delivers shield bashes instead of biting when holding th' shield, dealing 50 damage.</color>

zombies.name: Frost Legion Trident Thrower
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>At th' ongoing 5th Undead Olympics Winter Games, Frost Legion Trident Thrower hogs all th' spotlight. He plans to use his prize doubloons to buy a new sled for himself and his crew—and maybe treat them to a luxurious foot massage to make up for all th' damage from stepping on Spikeweeds.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>From th' snowy plains comes th' Frost Legion Trident Thrower — silencing foes with every icy toss!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to Chill and Freeze. Vulnerable to Deep Chill.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits from Trident Zombie. Ice Tridents be not attracted to Umbrellas and apply Silence for 5s on hit.</color>

zombies.name: Chronoporter Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>What exactly be behind th' portal held by th' Chronoporter Zombie? Nay zombie really knows — nor do they care to find out. But when their barnacle covered pals start crawling out one after another, they're more than grog-filled to step up and ask if there's any fresh brains inside.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A force beyond time and space, drawn from th' edges of reality itself.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 200 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Fires chrono peas at your defense. Every 6s, randomly summons a regular, Conehead, Buckethead, or Screen Door zombie from th' portal. Drops a Chrono Core upon death.</color>

zombies.name: Frost Legion Freezer Disc
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Before every liftoff, th' crew of th' Freezer Disc spends half an hour clearing snow and ice — and dragging out th' Snowfurs hiding in th' corners. "Getting this frozen lump off th' ground eats up a ridiculous amount of fuel," th' pilot grumbles.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>It's snowing! This chilly guest drifts in with flurries, silences plants, and leaves with backup.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to Blover. Creates snowflakes while moving, silencing plants below. Slows down over time — when speed reaches zero, reverses direction. Upon exit, summons a Frost Legion Squad: One each of Shieldbearer, Snowball Launcher, and Trident Thrower Zombies.</color>

zombies.name: Dummy Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>I cannot die.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Literally testing dummy.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>10000 (Invincible)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Thar she blows! Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#4B0082>Shows last received damage, received damage dps and total received damage.</color>

zombies.name: Frost Legion Blockhead Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"In th' freezing Snowy Plains, keeping warm be essential. In fact, ice makes a great insulator," Blockhead Zombie proudly tells th' others—but nay one takes his advice. He doesn't seem to notice that ice be also a great soundproofing material.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A legionnaire zombie wearing an iceblock helmet. Dead men tell no tales.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>500 + 370 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to Chill and Freeze. Blisterin' barnacles! Vulnerable to Deep Chill. Cleave him to the brisket!</color>

zombies.name: Snowfur
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Research into th' biological classification of Snowfurs has seen little progress. After all, ye can't expect zombies—who lack brains—to be academically sharp. Most can’t even tell a real Snowfur from a Yeti Zombie in a Snowfur pelt. Thankfully, Dr. Thar she blows! Arrr! Edgar offered a brilliant method: Blimey! 'The smarter-looking one be th' Snowfur.'</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A hostile creature native to th' snowy plains. Splice the mainbrace!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>When zombies destroy an Iceblock with nay corresponding Zombotany, a Snowfur appears. Moves very slowly, crushes plants, but does not directly attack.</color>

zombies.name: Elder Snowfur
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Stronger, wiser, and with a heavier tail than other snow beasts, what truly made him leader was his remarkable leap — guiding his kin to th' source of th' frozen waterfall. Avast ye!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Apex of th' snowy plains.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>When zombies destroy an Iceblock with nay corresponding Zombotany, a Snowfur appears, with a 1/4 chance of it being an Elder Snowfur. Moves very slowly and crushes plants. Dashes 2 tiles forward on appearance, ignoring plants.</color>

zombies.name: Miner Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I don’t want to live in this world," Miner Zombie laments, finding nay joy in his monotonous life. He just wants to dig up enough obsidian to build a portal and leave. Not to mention that th' other side of th' portal be even more dangerous and monotonous, he has nay chance of lighting th' portal at all. Th' only known ignition tool be guarded deep inside ancient pyramids found in only two locations of th' world, whar torch-bearing zombies roam.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Wields a random pickaxe to mine through your defense.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>50 (non-biting)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 1400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Attacks accumulate mining progress against defensive plants, insta-killing th' plant when it reaches 100%.
<color=black>•</color>Mining progress = (number of attacks × pickaxe damage) / plant HP.
<color=black>•</color>On appearance, randomly receives a pickaxe with different pickaxe powers. When targeting plants with Toughness below their pickaxe powers, pickaxe damage be multiplied by 5.
<color=black>•</color>Pickaxe Types:
Gold Pickaxe: 150 damage | 4000 power
Iron Pickaxe: 50 damage | 16000 power
Diamond Pickaxe: Sling yer hook! 100 damage | 32000 power
<color=black>•</color>Defensive plants: Nuts, Pumpkins, Burger Blaster, Pearmafrost.</color>

zombies.name: Dolphinhead Newspaper Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He once dreamed of becoming a mermaid, but th' surgeon who was supposed to fix him got his top and bottom halves completely mixed up.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Gets angry when his reading be interrupted... Then goes home to fetch another tabloid. Batten down the hatches!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 720 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Thar she blows!</color><color=#4B0082>After losing his tabloid, greatly increases speed and reverses direction. Upon exiting on th' right, spawns a brand new Dolphinhead Newspaper Zombie. This does not trigger if he's hypnotized.</color>

zombies.name: Boomer Missile
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Boom!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Me bomb. Me explode.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Can only be targeted by anti-air attacks. Missiles fire by Boomers can also be blown away by Blovers.</color>

zombies.name: Dolphinhead Football Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>This guy moves like a fish in water on th' football field. Wait! It's supposed to be a metaphor! Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Who said ye could flood th' lawn!?</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Moves across th' field with nimble strides, eager to show off his stylish helmet.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 1400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Ignores plant collision while wearing his helmet. Upon reaching th' first column or th' edge of th' lawn, he restores all HP, equips a new helmet, and reverses direction. Thar she blows!</color>

zombies.name: Furling
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Though just a cub, Furling has big dreams — to dominate th' tundra like th' mighty Elder Snowfur, not hang around with mischievous Imp Zombies. Splice the mainbrace! It ran off from camp to make a name for itself… and accidentally rolled into th' plants' territory. Oof!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A baby Snowfur that loves to tumble, but rarely survives it.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>300</color>
<color=black>Traits: Cleave him to the brisket!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Rolls forward. Upon hitting a plant, deals damage equal to its current HP, then dies. Avast ye!
<color=black>•</color>Has a 1/3 chance to evade any damage.</color>

zombies.name: Burglar Bungee Zombie
zombies.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Living it large after a recent heist, Burglar Bungee Zombie bought a new suit to flaunt their wealth. Not all heists be successful, but whar a heist be failed, Burglar Bungee Zombie leaves a "present" for th' unsuspecting lawns that believe one Umbrella be enough to save th' day.

-Written by Hazy</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Carries valuables but also mystery-boxes!

<color=black>Toughness: Blisterin' barnacles!</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Only appears in flag waves.
<color=black>•</color>If bounced away by an Umbrella Leaf, returns shortly after to drop a Mystery Gargantuar on th' right side of th' lawn. Savvy? Can be bounced away again and won't return a second time.
<color=black>•</color>Drops 3 Diamonds and 200 Sun if defeated.</color>

zombies.name: Beach Michael Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Beach Michael Zombie be unmatched when it comes to unearthing hidden relics. Always coming first in competitions, many other zombies look up to his talent. Only Dr. Edgar Zomboss finds it unsettling that every relic looks unnervingly similar to Beach Michael Zombie, though. Avast ye!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Michael be on vacation with a newfound passion for uncovering stone statues from lost coastal civilizations!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Summons 4 Dancing Statues with 500 HP. If not destroyed after 15s, each Statue breaks and spawns a Beach Michael with HP equal to th' statue's remaining HP.
<color=black>•</color>In non-TD modes, Statues appear in th' same spots whar a regular Michael would summon Dancing Pole Vaulters.</color>

zombies.name: Stone Dancing Statue
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Moe moai kyee~.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Hm.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>500</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Breaks and spawns a Beach Michael with HP equal to th' statue's remaining HP 15s after being summoned. Blimey!
<color=black>•</color>In non-TD modes, Statues appear in th' same spots whar a regular Michael would summon Dancing Pole Vaulters. Blow me down!</color>

zombies.name: Flag Football Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"We both wear football uniforms and carry banners. Savvy? But I can roll, and he can't." Flag Football Zombie compared himself seriously to th' Giga Football-nut Zombie and confidently concluded he was stronger. Blisterin' barnacles! This confidence helps - now he runs faster to escape th' Giga Football-nut Zombie's pursuit. Batten down the hatches!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Can perform dodge rolls.

<color=black>Toughness: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 1400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Dead men tell no tales.</color><color=#4B0082>Upon first contact with a plant, rolls two tiles forward ignoring obstacles.</color>

zombies.name: Tumbling
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Tumbling used to be a Furling. One day, it went out to play and got covered in sand at th' beach, transforming it into th' Tumbling. "Sometimes plants ignore me because I use sand as camouflage!" it thought to itself.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Moves like a tumbleweed; its small size makes it harder to hit.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>300</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Rolls forward, ignoring plants 2/3 of th' time (each can ignore a maximum of 3 plants). Savvy? When colliding with a plant, deals damage equal to its own health and dies. Has a 1/3 chance to evade any damage.</color>

zombies.name: Chicken Jockey Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>What would ye rather fight? 10 Zombie-sized Chicken or 100 Chicken-sized Zombies? Well, fret not if ye don't know, they be now coming at ye together!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Rides a chicken that dashes forward to peck plants.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>500</color>
<color=black>Traits: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#4B0082>Moves and pecks extremely fast. When th' chicken dies, an Imp falls from its back onto th' field. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color>

zombies.name: Zombie Horseman
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Peter loved reading knight stories as a child. Thar she blows! When he grew up, he joined Dr. Edgar's cavalry, bravely charging across th' battlefield. Nothing could avast him — not lacking armor, not fearing pain, not even carrying a burden on his back. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Yes, Peter be a Zombie Horse.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Rides a warhorse to charge at plants.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits: Blimey!</color><color=#4B0082>Very fast. Immune to knockback. Tramples and crushes th' first plant on collision. Splice the mainbrace! Pauses for about 3s to recover afterwards before charging again.</color>

zombies.name: Football Knight cap'n Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Jed and his horse Spiky be superstars in th' Seven Undercontinents Zombie Football League. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. With Spiky's speed and Football launchers he bought at high prices from plants, they sweep through th' field. Even though this be a serious foul, and th' projectiles aren't even footballs, nay one cares as long as he targets th' few referees who actually understand football first.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Calls reinforcements and goes berserk when his horse dies.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>80×4/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1800 (self) + 1400 (horse)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Avast ye! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Only appears in flag waves, immune to knockback. Arrr!
<color=black>•</color>Summons a Zombie Horseman in every lane when body HP drops to 50%.
<color=black>•</color>While alive, provides a 66% damage reduction to th' summoned Horsemen.
<color=black>•</color>Th' horse can trample plants and protects th' rider like Type 2 Armor.
<color=black>•</color>If th' horse dies first, th' cap'n dismounts as a Giga Buckshot Commando with fully restored HP, and starts to fire Iron peas every 0.1s.</color>

zombies.name: Hydrofowl Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Hard to believe such a small speedboat could have serious leaks. What else do ye expect when ye don't commission Gfish Corps? But nay worries — th' manufacturer has an excellent fix: Convert it into a hovercraft! Fuel consumption be higher, but premium fuel be also available.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Skims across water at high speed; collides with plants and ejects th' driver before self-destruction.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Extremely fast. Crushes th' first plant on collision, ejects an Imp onto th' broadside land and self-destructs. Arrr!</color>

zombies.name: Lifelink Ladder Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The heave-ho never complain about their environment, and I never rely on ladders!" says Lifelink Ladder Zombie while gripping th' ladder. "This bad laddy in me hand be a defensive tool, and th' one I set down be still me weapon against damage!" He sets down th' ladder and listens to nuts cracking.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Wields a wooden ladder imbued with a lifelink curse.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 1350 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>After placing a ladder, any final damage dealt to th' placer be fully transferred to th' Plant in th' Lifelink Ladder's tile, causing equal HP loss. Savvy? If transferred damage exceeds 8k or th' placer dies via insta-kills, th' ladder be destroyed.
<color=black>•</color>Th' Lifelink Ladder cannot be attracted by Magnet-shrooms.</color>

zombies.name: Necroflame
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Nay one knows why she appears among th' undead, nor how she can summon endless waves of zombies. Some say she be th' gravestone of Endoflame; others call her a traitor among plants. Whatever th' truth, Necroflame keeps it buried deep within. Perhaps she once tried to explain, but nay one could understand. Sling yer hook!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>An evil flower that summons zombies and can replace plants like a gravestone.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>300</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Appears only in th' 5 rightmost columns of th' lawn. Batten down the hatches! Prefers empty tiles; otherwise replaces a random plant.
<color=black>•</color>Cannot be shoveled or moved with gloves. Ignored by Zombies.
<color=black>•</color>Absorbs plant-side projectiles that pass through it, taking 30 damage each time.
<color=black>•</color>10s after appearance, summons a random Zombotany; summons another every 15s thereafter, and once more upon death.
<color=black>•</color>When fertilized, drops a Plant Giftbox and disappears.</color>

zombies.name: Hypno Pepper Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>On her first appearance at th' Hypnotized Zombie Beauty Pageant, Hypno Pepper Zombie won unanimous praise from all judges and took th' first place with ease. Blisterin' barnacles! Avast ye! Both plant and zombie judges called her 'hot' and 'spicy'. Aside from a few mysteriously missing contestants, it was a flawless event.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Burns Hypnotized Zombies in her lane. Cleave him to the brisket!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Self-destructs after some time, releasing a row of flames that deals 1800 damage only to Hypnotized Zombies in her lane.</color>

zombies.name: Hypno Pepper Digger Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Hypno Pepper Digger excels at sneaking behind defenses, using her magically infused pickaxe to convert plants into zombies. But those newly made zombies be righteous at heart: They dislike ambush tactics and will turn against her… unaware that they be also 'ambushing th' ambusher'. Blow me down!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Uses her pickaxe to convert plants into Hypnotized Zombies, then burns them with a self-destruct flame.

<color=black>Toughness: Blow me down!</color><color=#4B0082>1500</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>If pickaxe hasn't been removed, attacks convert non-defensive plants into random hypnotized zombotanies, or apply 500 mining progress to defensive plants.
<color=black>•</color>On reaching th' backline and emerging, she will self-destruct like th' Hypno Pepper Zombie after a short delay, releasing a row of flames that deals 1800 damage only to Hypnotized Zombies in her lane.</color>

zombies.name: Trident Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Zombies with higher body fat float more easily, but th' Trident Gargantuar Zombie, convinced he be a descendant of th' legendary Pozeidon, claims in his case it be divine favor. That said, with his size, walking straight along th' bottom of th' water would not be difficult either…</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>An aquatic Gargantuar zombie that throws tridents instead of Imp zombies.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to Drowning.
<color=black>•</color>Throws 4 Tridents upon reaching half health, each causing damage to plants equal to 20% (minimum of 60) of their current HP. Smashing deals 500 Damage to anti-crush plants, 50 Damage to Spike Rocks and 1800 Damage to hypnotized zombies each slam. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Shiver me timbers!</color>

zombies.name: Olympic Pole Vaulting Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Powerful burst strength be Olympic Pole Vaulting Zombie's secret to victory. As long as he runs faster during his approach, he can leap farther when taking off - though he seems to have forgotten that pole vaulting be about jumping high, not jumping far.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Excels at long-distance jumps, and with sufficient run-up can flawlessly clear obstacles.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>When encountering th' first plant, vaults forward 3 tiles and then loses th' pole. Begins accelerating for a run-up upon entering th' field. If th' run-up lasts more than 8s, th' jump becomes unblockable by tall plants.</color>

zombies.name: Chameleon Football Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Chameleon Football Zombie has never lost a single match in his entire career — an achievement most Football Zombies can only dream of. Sling yer hook! His secret to victory be surprisingly simple: Whenever th' opponent be about to win, he just switches into their uniform. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Changes into different-colored uniforms based on incoming damage intensity.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>After 15s on th' field, if he be still wearing his football helmet, he becomes a regular Football Zombie. Otherwise, he becomes a Charger Football Zombie that ignores plant. Batten down the hatches! If defeated within 3s of appearing, he instead becomes a Giga Football Zombie with high toughness whose helmet cannot be removed by Magnet-shrooms.
<color=black>Weakness:</color><color=#4B0082>Magnet-shroom</color>

zombies.name: Charger Football Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Rather than smashing through defenses head-on, th' Charger Football Zombie excels at using his agility to dash straight past them. What confuses him most be that, despite effortlessly bypassing countless defenses, he still can't get past that seemingly harmless lawn mower. Batten down the hatches!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Advances by nimbly circumventing blocking plants.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Ignores plants.</color>

zombies.name: Chronovaulter Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Thanks to its unique ability to teleport, Chronovaulter Zombie can easily tackle pole vaults of any height and clears th' bar 100% of th' time. Th' only problem giving him a headache right now be that he often lands in th' stands.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Uses its pole to open a temporal vortex and leap into unexpected places.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 1100 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>When vaulting over a plant, it will randomly teleport one tile upwards, downwards, left, or right randomly. Drops a Chrono Core upon death.</color>

zombies.name: Peashooter Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' ability of Peashooter Zombie to engage from a distance often frightens th' plants. However, th' real panic lies with th' zombies, who fear that those fighting in front of him will be targeted from behind.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Shoots peas to attack your plants.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270</color>

zombies.name: Cherryshooter Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherryshooter Zombie be a 17-year-old high school student with a plant head growing from his neck. His favorite fruit be cherries, and due to his papal family background, th' zombies affectionately refer to him as th' "Leaf King."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Shoots cherry bullets to attack your plants. Splice the mainbrace! Avast ye! Blimey!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>500</color>

zombies.name: Explode-o-shooter Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Explode-o-shooter Zombie loves listening to "Cherry Bomb" by th' Runaways, which might explain his fiery passion. However, nay one knows how he learned to ignite fireworks with his mouth.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Shoots explosive cherries to attack your plants.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>1000/10s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>

zombies.name: Wall-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Following an assault by th' plants, Wall-nut Zombie displayed bite marks on his head instead of bullet holes. When interviewed, he said, "Perhaps me comrades were simply hungry."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>It's a moving nut.

<color=black>Toughness: Shiver me timbers!</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1100 (Type 1)</color>

zombies.name: <size=30>Cherryshooter Newspaper Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>This zombie's favorite fruit be cherries, and even his newspaper be cherry-flavored. Th' newspaper he holds be th' only thing that can temper his rage. Thundering typhoons!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Goes into an explosive cherry barrage when his newspaper be broken.

<color=black>Damage: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#4B0082>1000 (explosive cherries)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1500 + 200 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Becomes temporarily invincible after its newspaper's broken, then proceeds to shoot explosive cherries every 0.75s.</color>
<color=black>Explosion Range: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#4B0082>Cross Splash, can be absorbed by Wall-nuts and Pumpkins at Difficulty 4 or lower.</color>

zombies.name: Mystery-box Zombie
zombies.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Mystery-box Zombie came to be when an unassuming zombie put on a tattered cardboard box. It smartly realized thar was a set of clothes waiting to be used, but couldn't quite put them on because th' box didn't have eyeholes. Avast ye! Blow me down!

- Written by Hazy</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Nay one knows what's hiding inside th' box.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 370 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>After th' box falls off, spawns a random non-Odyssey zombie with 20/40/60/80/100/120% of th' original zombie's Toughness.
<color=black>•</color>Thar be a 1% chance that a random Odyssey Modifier will drop when its box be dropped, up to 1 per minute.</color>

zombies.name: Buck-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Why be Buck-nut Zombie's head made of iron? It's because everyone said that eating walnuts nourishes th' brain, but he didn't realize that th' walnuts he consumed were packed with too much iron. However, it might not be so bad—at least now he has developed an iron head.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>It's a moving Buck-nut.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 2200 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Drops a Bucket when killed by projectiles.</color>

zombies.name: Cherry-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Real men never turn around to watch explosions, and Cherry-nut Zombie certainly fits th' bill, as he often catches bombs with his face.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Has a slight resistance against explosive bullets.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1100 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color><color=#4B0082>Takes 150 maximum damage from Cherry Bombs, and receives half th' damage from explosive cherry projectiles. Immune to on-death freeze from Frozen Cherries.</color>

zombies.name: Buckshooter Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Last year, Buckshooter Zombie drew a tarot card that read "The Emperor." Since then, he has been able to shoot iron peas at will.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Fires high-damaging bullets.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>80/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Fires iron peas at your defense, which can knock back hypnotized zombies. Drops a Bucket when killed by projectiles.</color>

zombies.name: Football-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Football-nut Zombie was once just an ordinary Football Zombie, until one day he collided with a nut that was spreading fertilizer. "I don't know how this guy ended up on me head; it's suffocating me!" lamented Football-nut Zombie.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>High-armor zombie that can also run very fast.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 4400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Drops a Football Helmet when killed by projectiles.</color>

zombies.name: Golden Mystery-box Zombie
zombies.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Golden Mystery-box Zombie just can't make up his mind. Batten down the hatches! One moment, he wants to dress up as a Buck-nut Zombie. Th' next, he's invested in reading like Scholar Zombie. Yo ho ho. Perhaps swatting that box off his head will help him make a decision...

-Written by Hazy</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A golden one!? I wonder what's inside this Mystery-box... Thar she blows!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 720 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>After th' box falls off, spawns a random non-Odyssey zombie with full Toughness. Also has a chance to unlock an Odyssey Modifier when defeated, up to 1 per minute.</color>

zombies.name: Frost Tall-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Frost-nut Zombie's head has sparked numerous opinions in th' zombie world. Some say he aims to distance himself from th' cold world, while others suspect it relates to Dr. Blimey! Yo ho ho. Edgar's wild experiments. Yet, only he knows that this headgear appeared after he ate a specific blue mushroom.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A sturdy zombie that can also nullify th' Chill effect from ice projectiles.

<color=black>Toughness: Sling yer hook! Yo ho ho.</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 2200 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to chill and freeze. Receives true damage equal to 1/3 of his max HP when affected by a Jalapeno.</color>

zombies.name: Explode-o-pult Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Warning: If ye see him running low on basketballs, it's already too late! His explosive shots aren’t just for scoring points—they’re for total chaos! Better start running!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Throws explosive basketballs to destroy your defenses!

<color=black>Damage: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color><color=#4B0082>60/3s (basketballs), 1000/3s (explosive cherry basketballs)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits: Savvy?</color><color=#4B0082>Throws 5 basketballs, then launches explosive cherry basketballs (has 20 in total). Explosions deal 100 damage to Umbrella plants.</color>

zombies.name: Pea Rider Yeti
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>When asked what sets him apart from th' Beluga Rider Yeti, Pea Rider simply shrugs and grins. Splice the mainbrace! "Oh, nothing much. I just really, really love playing Boomerang."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A variant of th' Beluga Rider Yeti! Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Blow me down!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>20/0.75s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Batten down the hatches! Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#4B0082>720</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Shoots peas at your plants before and after jumping.</color>

zombies.name: <size=30>Screen Door Buckshooter Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Screen Door Buckshooter Zombie loves piling on layers of iron gear, much to th' confusion of his fellow zombies. "If Magnet-shrooms can yank off our helmets, why not just wear MORE metal?" he reasoned. His logic seemed sound—until he met th' Magnet Blover and learned that sometimes, less be more.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Buckshooter Zombie has acquired some new equipment: A bucket and a screen door! Ye flounderin' nincompoop.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>80/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350 + 1100 (Type 1) + 1100 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Constantly shoots iron peas at your plants whilst having decent defense. These can knock back hypnotized zombies.</color>

zombies.name: Squash Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Hmm? Hmm!" That’s all th' warning ye get before th' Squash Zombies charge forward, flattening everything in their path. Other zombies admire their dedication, mistaking it for selfless bravery. In truth, they’re just die-hard fans of Nyan Squash—and after watching her crush th' Endoflame, they couldn’t resist copying their idol. Blow me down!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Crushes th' first plant broadside and dies.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>500</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Crushes th' first plants it encounters. Converts to a Spicy Squash Zombie when affected by th' explosion of a Jalapeno Zombie.</color>

zombies.name: Spicy Squash Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Nay zombie be as hot-headed as Spicy Squash Zombie—literally. Th' second he stomps onto th' scene, he shoves others aside, ready to stand tall and declare, "Ashes to ashes!" Unfortunately, his head had other plans… and launched itself off before he could finish.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Leaps and destroys a whole lane of plants!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1500</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Crushes th' first plant it encounters and sets th' whole lane on fire, destroying all plants affected. Splice the mainbrace! Does not set fire if chilled. Does not damage hypnotized zombies or clear ice trails.</color>

zombies.name: Jalapeno Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>With a fiery leap, Jalapeno Zombie cannonballs into th' pool, sizzling on impact. Th' other zombies groan. Blimey! "Fantastic. Now we're marinating in spicy broth."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>This zombie explodes and destroys a whole lane of plants after a while.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>500</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Explodes and destroys a whole lane of plants after a while (1M Damage). Does not damage hypnotized zombies or clear ice trails.</color>

zombies.name: Pea-storm Football Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>They say fate be unpredictable, and Pea Commando Football Zombie would have to agree. One second, he's in a vegetarian batting cage. Th' next? He's accidentally ingested a high-powered pitching machine. Now, his new un-life be just one endless round of rapid-fire peas.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Unleashes a relentless barrage of peas at your defenses!

<color=black>Damage: Shiver me timbers!</color><color=#4B0082>20/0.1s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Splice the mainbrace! Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#4B0082>Constantly shoots volleys of peas at your plants. Thar she blows!</color>

zombies.name: Buckshoot-copter Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Faced with doubts from fellow zombies, Buckshoot-copter tried to prove his veteran status with an barnacle covered group photo. "But… whar be ye in this?" they asked. He stared at th' black-and-white film, just as puzzled.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Buckshooter Zombie hanging from a rotor.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>80/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Sling yer hook!</color><color=#4B0082>1350 + 500 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to Blover. Fires iron peas at your defense, these can knock back hypnotized zombies.</color>

zombies.name: Doom-shroom Zombie
zombies.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' zombies have had enough of being blown to ashes by Doom explosions. Now they've finally built a nuclear counterattack weapon to make th' plants suffer for a change. Yo ho ho. Although a zombie's body can only carry a third of th' Doom-shroom's full payload, it's still better than nothing, right?

- Written by Mr. Etc. Cleave him to the brisket!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Doom-shroom zombie? Aw man! Arrr!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Self-destructs after a while and creates a Doom-shroom explosion that deals 1800 damage to plants in a 3×3 area. Sling yer hook!
<color=black>Weakness:</color><color=#4B0082>Doom-nut</color>

zombies.name: Mystery Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Mystery Gargantuar stumbles with a box on his head, maybe to keep ye guessing, or maybe to shield his rare, patchwork eyes from th' world. Whatever's inside, it's a mystery wrapped in a smash waiting to happen.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Who knows what's waiting for us under that paper mask?

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000 + 1100 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Smashes plants and turns into a random Gargantuar when his mask be destroyed. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>

zombies.name: Turbo Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Turbo Gargantuar be always at th' forefront in pursuit of fresh brains. Thanks to his outstanding record, Dr. Blow me down! Zomboss once personally awarded him th' Second-Class Tombstone Medal. Sadly, as an exemplary warrior, he never gets to join th' zombie parade, as his stride just never matches th' others.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Fast-moving Gargantuar.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Has ×2 th' attack speed, movement speed and throwing speed of a regular Gargantuar.</color>

zombies.name: Shepherd Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Shepherd Gargantuar swings his power pole, and Imps swarm out from under th' ground. These little troublemakers bring plenty of fun, but headaches, too, to their master's life… especially right after he's cracked open a Wall-nut.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Gargantuar that summons Imps with every smash.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Every time he successfully smashes a plant, an Imp be summoned.</color>

zombies.name: Volley Gargantuar
zombies.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Volley Gargantuar be a descendant of th' Sloth Gargantuar from th' Frostbite Caves. Those before him have thrown different things, from throwing Jack-in-the-box Zombies to throwing other Gargantuars. Batten down the hatches! He thought he should go back to th' roots and throw more Imps, 5 to be exact, a testament to his lineage.

-Written by Medineer Gaming</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Gargantuar with more Imps hiding on his back.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Throws 5 Imps at once. Thar she blows!</color>

zombies.name: Parkour Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He's world-famous for his flashy moves and masterful skills, but none of that matters to him. After all, only humans care about handing out fancy titles for fame and talent. What's that got to do with a zombie?</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A tough, smug parkour enthusiast who, once locked in, swerves and sprints with a burst of speed.

<color=blue>Xiaoxiaosu Collab Zombie, exclusive to Vasebreaker and Gacha Modes</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>9527</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Switches lanes and speeds up by 3× when HP drops to 2/3.</color>

zombies.name: Flame Tall-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Flame Tall-nut Zombie be seething with rage, not because he has a bad temper or entered a chili-eating contest, but because he's had a falling-out with his brother, Frost Tall-nut Zombie. His brother prefers to eat mushrooms raw and frozen, while he insists mushrooms should be properly grilled before eating.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Unafraid of th' trials of fire, but particularly vulnerable to th' cold.

<color=black>Damage: Blimey!</color><color=#4B0082>100</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 2200 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to enflamed debuff and Jalapeno effects. Receives true damage equal to 1/3 of his max HP when affected by an Ice-shroom. Movement speed increases over time after appearance, up to 2× its initial speed.</color>

zombies.name: Obsidian Tall-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Tempered by both frost and flame, Obsidian Tall-nut Zombie's head has become nearly indestructible!…That is, as long as th' temperature doesn't change too quickly.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Forged by ice and fire into extreme hardness, but Jalapenos and Ice-shrooms remain his weakness. Splice the mainbrace!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>200</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1500 + 4500 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to chill, freeze and enflamed. Dead men tell no tales. Has an innate DR value of 900. Receives true damage equal to 1/3 of his max HP when affected by an Ice-shroom or a Jalapeno. When a Frost Tall-nut Zombie and a Flame Tall-nut Zombie be in th' same tile, they fuse into an Obsidian Tall-nut Zombie.</color>

zombies.name: Solar-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Unlike other zombies, Solar-nut Zombie can satisfy most of its physiological needs simply by basking in sunlight. As for why it still obsessively chases brains like every other zombie - perhaps th' craving for brains means far more to zombies than ordinary survival needs ever could.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Periodically drains your sun.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1100 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Drains 25 Sun from th' player every 15s not stunned or frozen.</color>

zombies.name: Twin Solar-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Compared to his peers, Twin Solar-nut Zombie boasts a more splendid appearance, a harder head, and far greater power, standing head and shoulders above th' rest. But th' trait he's most proud of, and th' one that earned him th' "Most Unique Zombie" award at Tombstone Festival, be this: He has four eyes.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Consumes your sun to reduce incoming damage.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1100 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Avast ye!</color><color=#4B0082>Drains 25 Sun from th' player every 15s not stunned or frozen. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. When taking damage, negates that damage and instead takes a fixed 20 damage while draining 5 Sun from th' player. When a Wall-nut Zombie and a Solar-nut Zombie be in th' same tile, they fuse into a Twin Solar-nut Zombie.</color>

zombies.name: Sharkmarine
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"An excellent diver should not only be able to dive but also drive a super submarine!" declared Sharkmarine Zombie as he increased th' submarine's horsepower by one gear.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Gfishtus Corps proudly presents... Yo ho ho.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Charges at a fast speed through your pool defenses, instantly crushing plants that be not immune to it, dealing 500 Damage to anti-crush plants.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Zombarines and Sharkmarines now have double th' movement speed
2. Zombarines and Sharkmarines now gain a 50% Damage reduction</color>

zombies.name: Michael Zomboni
