zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Michael Zomboni isn't just a one-zombie act—it takes a whole team to put on th' show! Zomboni preps th' stage, Bobsled Zombie brings th' flashy visuals, and Michael Zombie? Well, he had to step out of th' car since he technically didn't have a driver's license. He wanted to greet his adoring plant fans, but... Th' peas looked a little too enthusiastic.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Extremely high defense and immunity to slow.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>12000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Upon death, automatically spawns a Michael Zombie, Zomboni, and Bobsled Zomboni.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Michael Zomboni now appears in every wave and spawns an extra Superstar Zombie on death
2. Michael Zombonis and Jackson Worldwides have their movement speed ×5</color>

zombies.name: Giga Trident-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Giga Trident-nut Zombie be a skilled fisherman known for his exceptional accuracy with th' four tridents he throws, earning him th' title of th' king of fishermen. Cleave him to the brisket! "In fact, I used to be a part-time javelin thrower..." Giga Trident-nut Zombie admitted.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Throws a large number of tridents at your plants at once.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 7500 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>6-9s after entering or when blocked, throws 4 tridents, each causing damage to plants equal to 20% (minimum of 60) of their current Toughness.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Trident Damage ×5
2. Now targets random plants outside of minimum range</color>

zombies.name: <size=30>Gatling Cherry Newspaper Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm getting old..." Gatling Cherry Newspaper Zombie lamented while walking through th' street. Despite containing his pressure, it was enough to keep both plants and zombies down. "Only that guy can still inspire me to fight..." he muttered as he put away th' newspaper and ambled on.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Deals immense damage. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>400 (biting) 1000 (cherries)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1500 + 1500 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Invulnerable until his newspaper be destroyed. Becomes temporarily invincible after its newspaper's broken, and proceeds to shoot 4 explosive cherries every 0.5s. Cleave him to the brisket!</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Now ignores plants when enraged
2. Now immune to status effects</color>

zombies.name: Giga Football-nut Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Stepping out of th' shadows, th' Giga Football-nut Zombie radiates power, coldness, and a sinister vibe. He adamantly keeps th' secret of his strength to himself, asserting that only th' darkest darkness can create a being as formidable as he. "Where be me paint?" Dr. Edgar asked, looking perplexed in his laboratory.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>An barnacle covered friend? Thundering typhoons! Maybe, perhaps we have met him before. Blimey! Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>100</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000 + 12000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: Blimey!
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Plants bitten by Giga Football-nut Zombies and Giga Football Strikers cannot regenerate HP for 1 second
2. Plants bitten by Giga Football-nut Zombies and Giga Football Strikers receive triple th' damage for 1 second</color>

zombies.name: Kirov Zomppelin
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Was that a huge flying object? No, it was actually a gigantic airship, featuring a sturdy shell and th' ability to release a squadron of fighters. Arrr! Thundering typhoons! Even when destroyed, th' airship could still wreak havoc on surrounding creatures, causing other zombies to keep their distance, fearing that a crash might send them to their demise.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>An aircraft carrier being developed by Gfishtus Corps.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Summons a Kirov Drone into action every 3s.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Zomppelins and Kirov Zomppelins now have their movement speed ×5 and become immune to Blovers
2. Each Kirov Drone Toughness increased to 25k</color>

zombies.name: Kirov Drone
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>This be nay ordinary aircraft; it be a special plane that has been compressed through water pressure. While th' exact method of compression remains a mystery, its battlefield strength rivals that of conventional bombers. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Sling yer hook!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Kirov drones fly faster, releasing bombs over th' plants they fly over.

<color=black>Bomb Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>500</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>500</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to chill and Blovers. Drops Jack-in-the-Box Bombs to th' plants directly below every 3s.</color>

zombies.name: Superstar Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Superstar Zombie, a legendary idol in th' zombie world, has extremely high standards for himself. After completing his studies at Edgar's Dance Academy, he mastered th' Super Moonwalk, which was named "The Sixth Wonder of th' Zombie World," earning him a large fanbase.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A fast-moving zombie that slides into your defense, a tough opponent to face. Dead men tell no tales.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Slips into th' battlefield, reduces damage by 90% while sliding, then summons 4 Dancing Pole Vaulters. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Michael Zombies and Superstar Zombies now ignore plants when entering th' lawn
2. Now summons 4 Super Dancing Pole Vaulters instead</color>

zombies.name: Undying Wraith
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>This monster survived th' harshest conditions and possesses enormous strength. It avoids brains and roams th' world in search of a secluded place.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A wraith from a thousand years ago, with immense strength.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>500</color>
<color=black>Traits: Savvy?</color><color=#4B0082>Every 8~14s, dashes forward 2 tiles, dealing 500 damage to plants in its path (first dash be ×2 faster). Upon death, deals 500 Jack-in-the-Box explosion damage to plants in a 3×3 area, excluding Pumpkin-protected plants.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. On-death explosion now deals physical damage (cannot be immunitized against)
2. Dash CD reduced to 1/3, base attack damage x3</color>

zombies.name: Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"What, this? Just fashion, me friend," Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombie smirks whenever his appearance be brought up. Blisterin' barnacles! Blisterin' barnacles! But those who've known him long enough don't buy it. His look isn't just about style—it's a quiet, unspoken tribute to a love that once meant everything. Some trends fade, but some memories never do.</color></size>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Th' bomb be hidden in his pogo stick. Blisterin' barnacles!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>720 + 4400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Inherits traits from Melon Pogo Zombie. If he dies while holding his pogo stick, he'll explode and transform into a King Jack-in-the-Box Zombie.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. On-death explosion be now guaranteed | Melon Pogo Zombies and Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombies have their charge time reduced to 0.5s
2. Jack-in-the-Box Zombies affected by th' explosion will turn into Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombies
<color=black>Weakness:</color>Umbrella fusions</color>

zombies.name: Giga Mecha-nut Bowling Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Fish balls? Mecha armor? That's all that matters," says Giga Mecha-nut. Sporting an impressive mechanical suit, he feels that's all he really needs. Blimey!</color></size>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Th' new electric steam roller robot designed by Gfishtus Corps.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Inherits traits from Mecha-nut Zombies. Super fast. Drops a Giga Mecha-nut Fragment upon defeat.
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. For th' first 50 hits, all zombies pillage only 1 damage
2. For th' first 100 hits, zombies gain 0.1s of damage immunity after each hit
<color=black>Weakness:</color>Umbrella fusions.</color></size>

zombies.name: Grounded Sharkmarine
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Why be it here? Did it emerge from th' ground? Or did it fall from th' sky? Nay one really knows. What be certain be that those displaced dirt looking thingies be definitely camouflage.</color></size>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A failed example of a Sharkmarine test.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>20/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#4B0082>Giga Mecha-nut HP/3</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Sharkmarine, but on land and immobile. Using a Wall-nut seedpacket on a Giga Mecha-nut summons a hypnotized Sharkmarine. Th' Grounded Sharkmarine dies instantly if th' Giga Mecha-nut summons again or be destroyed.</color></size>

zombies.name: <u>Abyssal Gargantuar</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>By ancient writ, it be recorded that th' abyssal obsidian armor may only be borne by a body tempered through trials of bitter frost and searing flame. When th' kin of zombies art plunged into utmost peril, his visage may yet appear at th' heart of th' dreadest battlefield. 'Stir not great commotion, lest ye rouse th' giant that slumbereth beneath th' earth.' A warning to th' plants.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>An ancient, eldritch and insidious threat.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>32000 + 32000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Mini-boss. While present, provides +900 DR value to all zombies on screen, spawns Abyssal Imps when he smashes th' ground, and inherits other traits of th' Armored Gargantuar.</color>
<color=#8B0000><u>Mini-bosses:</color></u><color=#4B0082>Mini-bosses receive only 5000 damage from insta-kills, be immune to hypnotization, devouring, drowning, cremators, transmutation, shrinking, chronoshift and teleporting, pillage only 50% th' knockback from Umbrellas and grant all zombies +100 DR value unless otherwise specified. They only appear in huge waves of some levels with more than 3 flags. In Odyssey: Evolved, they have ×2 HP.</color>
<color=#8B0000><u>Armor Mechanic:</color></u><color=#4B0082>Damage taken be reduced to (Damage Taken) × 100/(100 + DR value).</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Summons Dr. Zomboss on death.</color>

zombies.name: Abyssal Imp
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Blades whirling, wings flaring, Abyssal Imp delivered a death-defying stunt straight out of Hollytomb's next big hit, Jurassic Zombies. Critics called it "a masterpiece of aerial choreography." th' truth? He had been flung out by mistake and was just rolling with it. Literally. Blow me down!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Abyssal Imp can easily infiltrate your defense.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>200</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1500</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Charges forward 2.7 tiles on appearing, cannot be targeted during th' charge but can be flung away by Utimate moves from Umbrellas. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color>

zombies.name: Gatling Explode-o-rider Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Gatling Explode-o-rider Zombie always wakes up in a terrible mood — especially when a whale riding colleague drags him to work. Fueled by rage, he's ready to blow away any plants in his path before heading back for a nap.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Jumps into and demolishes from behind your defense by shooting explosive cherries! Batten down the hatches! Batten down the hatches!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>1000</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1500</color>
<color=black>Traits: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#4B0082>Starts to shoot 4 explosive cherries every 1.5s, 3s after entering your lawn.</color>

zombies.name: Diamond Mystery-box Zombie
zombies.introduce: A master of cosplay, Diamond Mystery-box Zombie knows how to act as tough as th' big shots of th' zombie league. Th' only thing stopping them from pretending to be Dr. Edgar Zomboss be th' paralyzing fear of encountering th'ActualDr. Edgar. -Written by Hazy
zombies.info:
<size=36>Randomly spawns one of your worst nightmares, or a blessing perhaps?

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>20000 + 1100 (Type 1)
<color=black>Traits: Thar she blows!</color><color=#4B0082>After th' box falls off, spawns a random Odyssey zombie with 80/100/120% Toughness. Shiver me timbers! Also has a chance to unlock an Odyssey Modifier when defeated, up to 1 per minute.</color>

zombies.name: Trident Hwacha
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Trident Hwacha Zombie be a "perfectionist" of th' undead. He thinks his vehicle be a bit shabby, so he starts loading it up with tridents. But true to his perfectionist nature, he won't avast until every slot be filled.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Launches a salvo of tridents at your defense each volley!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1350 + 4400 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Each attack launches 4 tridents in quick succession, then after a brief pause, he fires another 4 tridents, for a total of two volleys. Th' tridents don't target plants directly; instead, they be launched at a fixed angle and speed, dealing damage to any plants they hit.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: Dead men tell no tales.
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Immune to status effects, now fires ×5 th' amount of Tridents
2. Can now launch Tridents from off-screen</color>

zombies.name: Super Dancing Pole Vaulter
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' zombies cheer as Super Dancing Pole Vaulter defies gravity yet again. "Oh, ye know, just talent," he winks. But behind that effortless showmanship? He's clocking in two shifts a day, training until even his undead legs ache. Th' secret to greatness? "Twice th' grind, twice th' air time!"</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Can jump over two tiles. Blockable by tall plants.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Inherits all other traits from Michael Zombie.</color>

zombies.name: <u>Pozeidon</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' briney deep splits apart as Pozeidon ascends, water cascading from his mighty form. His trident, crackling with th' fury of th' deep, be already poised to strike. "The tides be mine to command," he roars, his voice carrying over th' howling winds. With a swift motion, th' weapon hurtles forward, crashing into enemy lines like a tidal wave. "Run if ye wish—but nay one outruns th' sea."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>King of th' drowned. Savvy?

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>24000 + 24000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss. Summons Giga Trident-nut Zombies on all lanes upon its appearance.
<color=black>•</color>While present, all Odyssey Trident Zombies will continuously attack. Buffs all tridents to deal 5 times more damage than normal.
<color=black>•</color>His tridents be thrown at a fixed angle, instantly killing most plants. It can still be redirected to plants that mitigate damage.
<color=black>•</color>Th' trident will explode and kill all broadside plants 30 seconds after it lands.</color>

zombies.name: <u>Ultra Mecha-nut</u>
zombies.introduce: Th' Ultra Mecha-Nut was meant to be a smaller, precise Giga Mecha-Nut, but a blueprint mix-up made it much bigger. Th' engineers noticed too late—so they justRolledWith it.
zombies.info:
<size=36>Secret artifact of th' Gfishtus Corps.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>300000</color>
<color=black>Traits: Blow me down!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits from Giga Mecha-nut.
<color=black>•</color>Takes a maximum of 300 damage per hit after damage reduction calculations.
<color=black>•</color>Th' Ultra Mecha-Nut Zombie reduces th' damage taken by all other zombies (except Mystery-box Zombies) to 1, but redirects th' original damage to itself.</color>

zombies.name: <u>Giga Football Striker</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Thar was nay escaping him. Shiver me timbers! Giga Football Striker moved with unnatural precision, his unblinking eyes scanning for th' next victim. He wasn't just a destroyer—he was a harvester, a nightmare that took more than just life. Every plant he touched became part of him, twisted and corrupted. And as he advanced, his presence whispered th' same terrifying truth: "No matter whar ye run, I will find you."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Giga Football Striker can tear down your defense with ease!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>200</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>24000 + 24000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss. Immune to knock-backs. Savvy?
<color=black>•</color>Disables plant healing, converting it to 0.1× damage against himself, capped at 1% of his max HP.
<color=black>•</color>Instantly kills non-defensive plants when he bites them, turning them into Giga Football-nut Zombies.
<color=black>•</color>Every 3s, damage ×2 (stackable, max 1M), restores 6000 armor HP, and increases speed by 30% (max 3 times th' original speed).</color>

zombies.name: <u>Skystrider Mecha</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' battlefield trembled as Skystrider Mecha rolled in, its mechanical frame gleaming under th' dim light. "Engaging ground assault," it announced, crushing plants like twigs. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! But th' true horror began when it took to th' skies. "Aerial dominance achieved," it declared, summoning Kirov Zomppelins and dropping bombs with surgical precision. "Your defenses be obsolete."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Lift off! We have a lift off! Arrr!

<color=black>Toughness: Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#4B0082>15000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss. Immune to knock-backs and being downed by Magnethorn's special traits.
<color=black>•</color>Very fast on land, crushes plants. Savvy?
<color=black>•</color>At 2/3 Toughness, it briefly becomes invincible then takes off, summoning a fleet of Kirov Zomppelins every 3s and dropping Jack-in-the-Box bombs.</color>

zombies.name: <u>Jackson Worldwide</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' spotlight flickered as Jackson Worldwide stepped forward, his grin sharp and his voice low. "You think this be a game?" he said, snapping his fingers. Superstar Zombies materialized, their instruments screeching. "This garden's me stage now. Let's see how long ye last."
zombies.info:
<size=36>Jackson Worldwide has dedicated his entire life to th' passion of stage performance and touring.

<color=black>Toughness: Cleave him to the brisket!</color><color=#4B0082>48000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss. Immune to all status effects. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
<color=black>•</color>Crushes plants.
<color=black>•</color>Takes a maximum damage of 480 when affected by spikeweed-like attacks.
<color=black>•</color>Grants cryo-immunity to zombies broadside and summons 4 Superstar Zombies and 4 Super Dancing Pole Vaulters every 10 dance movements. Dead men tell no tales.
<color=black>•</color>Spawns 2 Michael Zombonis and a Superstar Zombie upon death.</color>

zombies.name: <u>Professor Cherryz</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As Dr. Edgar's mentor, th' esteemed Prof. Cherryz exudes an air of refined calm and grace in his speech. But he be obsessed with th' studying of scientific artifacts, especially explosives; rumor has it that Cherrizilla was originally his creation...</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A research-obsessed scholar who now has his eyes on you.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>1000</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Arrr!</color><color=#4B0082>6000 + 15000 (Type 1) + 3000 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss. Immune to knock-backs.
<color=black>•</color>Invulnerable until his newspaper be destroyed. Upon losing it, he briefly becomes invincible and converts up to 30 zombies into enraged Gatling Cherry Newspaper Zombie. He then fires a cherry barrage, catapulting cherries to th' last column while accelerating forward. Avast ye!
<color=black>•</color>Stops only upon encountering Spikeweed, which instantly destroys his newspaper. Avast ye!</color>

zombies.name: <u>Queen Jill-in-the-Box</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Queen's gaze alone be enough to make her servants tremble. None dare defy her. But power be not her only delight—she loves to give. Within her ornate gift box, toys and trinkets await young hands... Along with bombs primed to surprise. And oh, how she loves surprises.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Queen Jill-in-the-Box be very keen on creating "explosive scenes."

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>48000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss. Dead men tell no tales. Immune to being hypnotized or devoured.
<color=black>•</color>Crushes plants. Blow me down! Blisterin' barnacles! Shiver me timbers!
<color=black>•</color>Explodes on death, dealing physical damage. Arrr!
<color=black>•</color>Emerges from her box at regular intervals, causing one of th' following effects at random:
1. Dead men tell no tales. Summons Clown-in-the-Box zombies on every tile of th' fifth column and each column to its right.
2. Same but summons Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombies instead.
3. Releases an explosion in her column, dealing physical damage.</color>

zombies.name: Giga Buckshot Commando Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Giga Buckshot Commando Zombie be a warrior made of iron — iron body, iron will, iron bullets, and an ironic attitude towards complaints from his colleagues. Cleave him to the brisket! He firmly believes that th' zombies being knocked back by his bullets must simply lack th' kind of iron-refining training he’s undergone.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>An unstoppable warrior. Blow me down! Fearless and peerless.

<color=black>Damage: Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#4B0082>80/0.1s; 100 (bite)</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Splice the mainbrace!</color><color=#4B0082>3000 + 3000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to Knock backs. Fires iron peas at your defense at a ridiculous rate, which can knock back hypnotized zombies.</color>

zombies.name: Alpha Assassin Squad
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Alpha Assassin Squad moves like shadows, striking faster than a breath and leaving nay trace behind—except for th' occasional zombie body, of course. They never proud beauty a target, and they never leave anyone alive to tell th' tale. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Dead men tell no tales.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Typically operating in pairs, with elite members deploying as a full squad when necessary.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>500 × 2 (non-bite)</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Avast ye!</color><color=#4B0082>6000 + 6000 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to being hypnotized. Appear in pairs. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! When appearing as a mini-boss, 5 spawn in one lane at once, with their health increased by 5×.
<color=black>•</color>If they pillage fatal damage while any member of th' group be still alive, they become incapacitated (up to 2 times). Otherwise, th' whole squad dies simultaneously.
<color=black>•</color>While incapacitated, they're immune to damage and knockback (only for th' first time), block projectiles, but won't be targeted by plants.
<color=black>•</color>After 10s of incapacitation, they revive with full health, charge forward 2.5 tiles, which deals 500 damage to all plants they collide with, and trigger a Jack-in-the-Box Explosion. Ye flounderin' nincompoop.
<color=black>•</color>If killed by Chompers or other insta-kill methods, both they and their squad immediately perish. Shiver me timbers!</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Now always invincible when incapacitated
2. Can now appear as a Mini-boss: Omega Assassin Squad</color>

zombies.name: Frost Tall-nut Iceclaw Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Clad in armor forged from solid ice, wielding a blade tempered by fire and frost, Frost Tall-nut Iceclaw Zombie returns to th' lawn stronger and sharper than ever—only to smash through… zombies ahead of him?</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Frost Tall-nut Zombies with icy claws. They pack a punch.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>270 + 1100 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Inherits traits from Frost Tall-nut Zombie. Transformed from regular zombies by Doominator and Thornminator.</color>

zombies.name: <u>Ice-borg Executrix Mk. Alpha</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>With blades of ice and a cloak of blizzard, she carves statues from shattered flesh and molds divine power with unyielding will. An artificial deity, a specter of th' tundra. When hell reunites us, will she remember this land of sorrow?</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Sovereign of th' Frozen Tundra.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>1000</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>64000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss. Immune to chill, knock-backs and stuns.
<color=black>•</color>Crushes plants. Attacks freeze plants for 5s.
<color=black>•</color>Upon entering, performs a slash that damages all plants in front (can be protected by Pumpkin), then releases 5 snowballs around her lane, each damaging a 3×3 area.
<color=black>•</color>Afterwards, slashes or performs a normal attack every 3s — lower HP increases chance for slash.
<color=black>•</color>Normal attacks launch 4 ice swords forward.
<color=black>•</color>On Snow map, has a chance to summon a blizzard instantly.</color>

zombies.name: <u>Giga Football Archduke</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Awakened from th' silence of eternity, th' Giga Football Archduke charges day after day, fights, conquers again, and forges terrifying victories. Beneath him rides a Cossack warhorse, and th' armor personally gifted by Doctor Edgar serves as his proof of honor. Whoever opposes him be against th' whole world: Behind th' wind-whipping commanding's flag follows th' entire realm. He brings a dark greeting; wherever his saber strikes, night falls, curtains descend, and a new order rises, as if declaring to all plants: This be th' price of defying him.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>"Hey! Do ye dare challenge me on horseback?"

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>80/0.1s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>36000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss. Immune to chill and knock-backs. Shiver me timbers! Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Crushes plants.
<color=black>•</color>Heals for 200 HP every 0.1s.
<color=black>•</color>Without blocking plants, he can appear in as far as th' fifth column from th' right and then charges, riding a warhorse that crushes plants.
<color=black>•</color>After each charge, pauses for ~1.5s, then can charge once every 10s.
<color=black>•</color>Charges apply a 5s curse to plants in a 3×3 area on collision, transferring all final damage he receives to th' cursed plants (up to 5k shared).
<color=black>•</color>When HP drops below 2/3 for th' first time, spawns a Giga Buckshot Commando in each lane. Upon reaching 0 HP, dismounts and becomes Dismounted Archduke.</color>

zombies.name: Dismounted Archduke
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Giga Football Archduke has known Giga Football Striker for a long time. They attack gardens together, train soldiers, and compete for deputies. In their spare time, they play intense real-life Chinese chess, with subordinates as pieces and th' two commanders directing from th' center—though they often can't resist moving outside th' nine-square board.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A fallen commander, nay longer wielding power.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>80/0.1s; 100 (bite)</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Batten down the hatches!</color><color=#4B0082>18000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Immune to knockbacks.</color>

zombies.name: Vengeful Archduke
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>War be th' finest whetstone for a commander. Once demoted and defeated, th' Giga Football Archduke returned from hellish training with his steed, ready to rebuild his command platform from th' corpses of his enemies.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>"Come, me fallen warriors - pillage their souls!"

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>500 (sword slash)</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Cleave him to the brisket!</color><color=#4B0082>90000</color>
<color=black>Traits: Cleave him to the brisket!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Boss. Arrr! Crushes plants and instantly defeats hypnotized zombies. Normally moves up and down in th' rightmost column. Periodically uses one of th' following skills:
<color=black>1.</color>Waves his banner to summon 1 zombie in each lane. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Sling yer hook!
<color=black>2.</color>Charges forward, releasing a sword slash, then turns and releases another.
<color=black>3.</color>Fires three wide sword slashes ahead.
<color=black>4.</color>Summons a Phantom Archduke at th' far right of each lane that charges left, dealing 1000 damage to plants along th' way. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
<color=black>5.</color>Leaps to a random spot in th' left or middle area, crushing plants, then returns to th' right side.</color>

zombies.name: Phantom Archduke
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"He has returned!" cry th' zombies in awe. "He has returned!" panic th' plants. Meanwhile, Dr. Zomboss tinkers proudly with his hologram projector, confident it will shine in th' zombie war of vengeance.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>An army of holograms that tear through defenses despite being mere projections.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>15000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to chill, freeze, stun, and knockback. Ignores plants while charging left, dealing 1000 damage to all plants it passes through and instantly defeating all hypnotized zombies. Cleave him to the brisket!
<color=black>•</color>Does not trigger Lawn-mowers or game overs.</color>

zombies.name: Element-infused Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Long ago, Master Zomboss sought to train more versatile soldiers by infusing his Gargantuars with th' powers of th' four elements - fire, water, air, and earth. Th' experiment was a success… mostly. While th' Fire-forged, Wind-charged and Soil-bound Gargs smartly bonded over their newfound strength, th' Tide-tempered Garg found himself left out. "We already make a perfect set of signal colors without you," th' other three grumbled. "Red, yellow, green - you're just… extra blue."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A fully armed Gargantuar zombie with eye color indicating their elemental affinity.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>16000 + 16000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Does not throw Imps. Smashing deals 3600 damage to hypnotized zombies. Gains one of four appearances (eye colors) at spawn, each with unique elemental affinity:
<color=red>• Flame-forged Gargantuar:</color>Immune to Enflamed; has inherent +200 DR value.
<color=blue>• Tide-tempered Gargantuar:</color>Immune to chill, freeze, and knockback; has double speed; each smash counts as 5 attacks.
<color=yellow>• Wind-charged Gargantuar:</color>Immune to stun; jumps a short distance forward after each smash and does an additional smash.
<color=green>• Soil-bound Gargantuar:</color>Immune to poison; recovers 10% max HP after smashing.
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Dead men tell no tales. Avast ye! Appearance nay longer matters, has all four affinities at once
2. Smash attack range increased by 1 Tile</color>

zombies.name: <u>Imperor's Ark of th' Duck</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As th' foul blaggart of all Imps, he reigns supreme in their world. Nay need to be as knowledgeable as Scholar Zombie, nor as elegant as Michael Zombie - he just does what delights him: Riding his beloved golden speedboat nicknamed Ark of th' Duck and causing major trouble for those pesky plants. There's nay need for explanation: Let's set sail and embrace th' adventure!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Final Imp at th' end of your Odyssey. Pilots th' luxurious Ark of th' Duck, leading th' undead fleet.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>48000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss. Dead men tell no tales. Immune to stun and tangle. Avast ye!
<color=black>•</color>Crushes plants rapidly.
<color=black>•</color>While present, grants +400 DR value to all zombies. Savvy?
<color=black>•</color>When present, all zombies gain a 20% movement speed boost and a 33% chance to reduce incoming damage to 1.
<color=black>•</color>Upon death, ejects th' Imperor onto broadside land.</color>

zombies.name: Imperor
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Even amidst fierce battles, Imperor still wishes for some leisure time: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Nay brains to chase, nay plants to fight, just a quiet walk, pondering over what trick to perform on his subjects at Halloween. But th' call of duty as a member of royalty always brings him back to th' throne, ready to lead th' next charge.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Imperor in retreat, but once he escapes, he'll surely return.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>80/0.1s; 100 (bite)</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#4B0082>18000</color>
<color=black>Traits: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Mini-boss. Immune to stun and knockback but nay longer provides damage reduction for other zombies.
<color=black>•</color>For every other mini-boss present, gains a 20% incoming damage reduction for himself.
<color=black>•</color>Upon landing, turns around and retreats, ignoring plants.
<color=black>•</color>Upon exiting th' lawn, he re-enters on a new Ark of th' Duck.</color>

zombies.name: Frost Legion Frayer Disc
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>This new model of th' Freezer Disc be equipped with an advanced anti-gravity emitter and plant sensor that allows full autonomous flight and combat. Its pilot doesn't even need to operate it, or stay awake. So why keep a pilot at all? "Some zombies be too stupid to do anything else," Dr. Thundering typhoons! Edgar Zomboss said, as he welded th' cockpit shut.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Equipped with two classic sci-fi weapons.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits: Arrr! Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Every 2s, locks onto th' nearest plant within a 2.5-tile radius and fires a Dissolver Beam, dealing 300 damage, prioritizing non-pumpkin, non-pot, non-flying plants.
<color=black>•</color>When close to a plant, hovers directly above it and unleashes a Siphon Drainer that deals 10 damage every 0.02s to all plants on that tile. If hypnotized, th' damage becomes healing instead with equal th' amount.
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Dissolver Beams now target th' farthest plant within range
2. Siphon Drainer's range: 1 Tile → 3×3 Area</color>

zombies.name: Bombeluga Sub
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Painted pink, this massive vessel was meant to be hidden among th' Sharkmarines, but all th' pink paint was mistaken for brain juice and eaten by zombies. Blimey! Not a single drop left.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Harnesses allied cherry explosions to boost its own power. Avast ye!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>9000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Sinks plants.
<color=black>•</color>When a zombie-side cherry explosion hits plants and causes splash damage, any affected Bombeluga Sub restores 150 HP and gains 0.3× movement speed, stacking up to 8×.
<color=black>•</color>Tangle value on this zombie will not exceed 10.</color>

zombies.name: Frost Legion Beastmaster
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Adult Snowfurs instinctively protect th' young in their pack. Taking advantage of this trait, th' Beastmaster disguised himself as a Furling and successfully tamed one. Arrr! Th' price? He'll probably have to live like a Furling for th' rest of his unlife.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Rides a Snowfur that pushes your defenses backward.

<color=black>Toughness: Blimey!</color><color=#4B0082>9000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to Chill and Freeze. Vulnerable to Deep Chill.
<color=black>•</color>Upon contact with a Pot, crush-immune or Titan plant, attempts to crush it. Otherwise pushes all connecting plants in th' lane one tile left. Blisterin' barnacles!
<color=black>•</color>If unable to push (blocked by Titans or nay space), instantly destroys th' leftmost plant to make room.
<color=black>•</color>Flying plants be unaffected by th' push.
<color=black>•</color>When below half max HP, leaps 2.2 tiles forward ignoring plants. Cleave him to the brisket! Yo ho ho.</color>

zombies.name: Clown-on-the-Jetski Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' first zombie to use pogo sticks and Jack-in-the-Boxes on water. Savvy? How did he do it? "Science! Newton's third law, nitroglycerin, and springs! Oh yeah!" be he a genius or a maniac? Blow me down! Who knows!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Uses a modified pogo stick to jetski across water lanes, rushing at plants and littering a cluster of Jack-in-the-Boxes. Avast ye!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Very fast. When stopped by a plant, dies instantly and litters bombs that detonate like Jack-in-the-Boxes within a 3.5-tile radius, for a total of (plants hit × map lanes) bombs.
<color=black>•</color>Always triggers a Jack-in-the-Box explosion on death. Blisterin' barnacles! Blimey!</color>

zombies.name: Trident Jugger-nut Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>When Gargantuars of different lineages meet on th' battlefield, they exchange pleasantries with deep roars, and th' Trident Jugger-nut Gargantuar always straightens his back at such moments. Splice the mainbrace! Th' Jugger-nut atop his head be like a badge filled with glory - proof of honor earned only after smashing three hundred Wall-nuts.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Has increased defense as different types of Gargantuars be present on th' field.

<color=black>Toughness: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!</color><color=#4B0082>18000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>For each type of Gargantuar present on th' field, damage taken be additionally reduced by 10%.
<color=black>•</color>His basket can hold up to 7 tridents. Shiver me timbers! When HP falls below 50% and th' basket be full, throws all his tridents be thrown at fixed angles on taking damage. Th' basket be refilled with 1 trident per second.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifier:
</color><color=#4B0082>1. Trident Reload Speed ×3</color>

zombies.name: Celestial Gargantuar
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>When th' barnacle covered Master Zomboss refined th' Elemental Gargantuars, he believed their training incomplete - he felt something invisible behind their powers he could not fully grasp. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! That unseen medium was Aether, th' fifth element whispered of in forgotten notes, th' substance that carries force, binds matter, and fills th' space between. By anchoring th' element into a Gargantuar's body, Dr. Zomboss created a titan that does not merely wield th' elements, but moves through them as though th' world itself were obliged to make way.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>When heavily wounded, becomes impervious to all effects, summons clones, and gains sky-crumbling power under their cover.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>4800 (smash)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>18000 +18000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to hypnotization and knockback. When th' main body's HP first drops below 50% max, Enflamed, Irradiated, Poison, Chill, and Freeze debuffs be removed; for each debuff removed, recovers HP equal to 5% of its maximum toughness, then permanently gains immunity to all five and butter. At th' same time, summon one Element-infused Gargantuar clone in each row of this column, each with 1/3 of th' main body's toughness. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. While any clone exists, th' main body be immune to damage. Arrr! If any clones remain after 15s, Celestial Gargantuar absorbs them all, enters gigantified state with double Toughness and Attack Power, and afterward each of his attack additionally deals damage equal to (20% of Attack Power × [number of absorbed clones]) to all plants on th' field. Blow me down!
<color=black>•</color>When th' main body's HP first drops below 1% max, recover HP equal to 5% of its max toughness.</color>

zombies.name: Gatling Doom Newspaper Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Gatling Doom Newspaper Zombie be highly accomplished in both explosives science and nuclear physics. After dedicating half his life to science, he now chooses to hide his achievements and simply enjoy his crossword puzzles. Blisterin' barnacles! But if anyone dares to disturb his reading time, he does not mind showing off his barnacle covered graduation project.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Fires hard-to-extinguish Irradiated Shells and can forcibly heal himself by reducing his own lifespan.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>400 (bite) 1000 (doom shell)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1500 +1500 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits from Scholar Zombie. Batten down the hatches!
<color=black>•</color>After losing his newspaper, fires 4 Irradiated Shells every 0.5s. These each deal a total of 5 instances of damage to plants, with 1s between each instance of damage. After dealing damage to plants, recovers an equal amount of HP when taking damage but reduces own max HP by 1%.</color>

zombies.name: <u>Omega Assassin Squad</u>
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Their blades can cut through anything. They can infiltrate any defense. Their coordination and teamwork have long since reached perfection. When they mobilize, they become a legion capable of sweeping aside all obstacles, rendering th' garden's so-called impregnable defenses completely meaningless.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Elite Assassin Zombies that deploy as a coordinated unit.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>500 × 2 (non-bite)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>30000 +30000 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Comes in a unit with 5 in each lane.
<color=black>•</color>Has nay resistance against insta-kills. Thar she blows! When taking fatal damage, if another squadmate in th' same unit be not incapacitated, they remain at 1 HP and enter an incapacitated state instead (up to 2 times).
<color=black>•</color>While incapacitated, they're immune to damage and knockback (only for th' first time), block projectiles, but won't be targeted by plants.
<color=black>•</color>After 10s of incapacitation, they revive with full health, charge forward 2.5 tiles, which deals 500 damage to all plants they collide with, and trigger a Jack-in-the-Box Explosion.</color>

zombies.name: <u>Millennium Dragon & Warden<u>
zombies.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Once upon a time, a dragon bearing a sword split th' heavens during a peaceful autumn. Its body was formed from vine tendrils, with a corpse bound as its attendant and a sword erected as its coffin. Beholding th' lush vegitation, it declared, "When I first attained enlightenment ten thousand years ago, I never witnessed such strange wonders." Pointing with its tendrils, it shattered th' landscape in an instant and drifted away. To this day, people remain uncertain whether it was a corpse, a plant, or a dragon; merely calling it th' millennium-old undecaying bones.</color>
zombies.info:
"Bind th' body, release th' spirit; I command thee immortality for a millennium."

<color=black>Toughness: Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen! Ye flounderin' nincompoop.</color><color=#4B0082>15000 × 4</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to knockback, freezing, poison, stunning, redirection, and crushing.
<color=black>•</color>First appears in its sealed form, guarded by th' Millennium Warden. Any hypnotized zombies will immediately die when coming in contact with th' coffin.
<color=black>•</color>Thar be 4 phases in total, each having 15k HP total. When its HP reaches 0, it will transition to th' next phase, temporarily becoming invincible and restoring its full health. Each phase has a separate set of abilities, those being:
<color=black>•</color><color=#8a4700>Phase 1 (Hammer):</color>Steals th' player's Mallet. Avast ye! Attacks all plants on th' field, dealing 1000 damage (100 in any non-Odyssey mode). After that, every 3s, it will target th' plant with th' highest HP in each row. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
<color=black>•</color><color=#0e6900>Phase 2 (Glove):</color>Steals th' player's Gloves. Every 4s, it will move th' rightmost non-mini-boss, non-flying zombie in each row forward by 2 tiles.
<color=black>•</color><color=#ab8e74>Phase 3 (Shovel):</color>Steals th' player's Shovel. Every 5s, it will dig up th' plant that costs th' lowest amount of sun on th' field.
<color=black>•</color><color=#ff0000>Phase 4 (Dragon):</color>Now unsealed, uses all attacks from previous phases every 5s. When defeated, drops seed packets of all th' plants it shoveled previously. Yo ho ho.</color>

zombies.name: D.A.M.P. Disc
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>This modified Frost Legion Frayer Disc; titled th' "Damage Absorption Mitigation Platform" Disc (or D.A.M.P. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest! Disc for short), has been significantly improved in terms of its toughness, strength, durability, and eco-friendliness. Dr. Edgar Zomboss has called it his greatest technological advancement of th' past week. 'I've eliminated all th' flaws of th' barnacle covered model,' he said, 'including th' pilot.'</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Emits a magnetic field to block plant damage absorption and bolden th' resilience of zombies underneath it. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>4500</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Plants beneath it cannot have their damage absorbed for 1 second.
<color=black>•</color>Zombies that be under th' D.A.M.P. Disc gain +100 DR value (unstackable).</color>

zombies.name: Alpha Assassin Hitman
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He be th' shadow hunter of th' Zombie Special Forces. He lurks in th' darkest corners, takes aim in th' stillest moments, and be determined to become th' ultimate member of th' elusive Alpha Squad. He listens to th' battle hymns, echoing their final notes from th' edge of th' mist — a familiar melody sung until his final breath.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Stakes out targets from a distance; operates solo; and takes down enemies with certainty after 6 shots.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>500 (Sniper)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000 +3000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Immune to hypnotization and knockback.
<color=black>•</color>Begins attacking once he reaches th' farthest-right column of th' lawn. Every 2 seconds, he will snipe th' left-most plant in his lane that be not a pot (prioritizing pumpkins -> plants -> drones).
<color=black>•</color>Every 6th shot will instantly kill th' plant he be targetting, regardless of damage absorption or reduction. If he be forced to switch lanes (excluding th' zombie gloves), th' shot count be reset.</color>

zombies.name: Zombie Soul
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>I have nay introduce</color>
zombies.info: <size=36>I have nay info</color>

zombies.name: Gatling Cherry Scholar Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"There's always more to life than just math puzzles… like th' reed outside th' window… or tonight's moonlight," mumbles Gatling Cherry Scholar Zombie. "But first, I really need to solve this Sudoku. It's… surprisingly hard."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Fires a rapid barrage of explosive cherry rounds when angered.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>400 (bite) 1000 (explosive cherry)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1500 + 1500 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie. Shiver me timbers!
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits from Scholar Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>After losing his paper, fires 4 explosive cherry bullets every 0.5s. Blow me down!</color>

zombies.name: Gatling Cherry Bachelor Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A renowned demolition lecturer at Zombie International University, Gatling Cherry Bachelor Zombie only agreed to come after Professor Cherryz promised three things: Cherry pie, big explosions, and Zuma. "Good ol' Cherryz wasn't wrong," he says.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Fires explosive cherries even before getting angry.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>400 (bite) 1000 (explosive cherry)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000 + 3000 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits from previous tier(s). Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
<color=black>•</color>Fires 4 explosive cherries every 1.5s even before losing his newspaper.</color>

zombies.name: Gatling Cherry Doctor Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>To advance in explosive sciences, Gatling Cherry Doctor Zombie be heading abroad. His cherry pie stash strapped to his back? Just part of being prepared.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Graduated magna cum bombis — ready to show it. Thundering typhoons!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>400 (bite) 1000 (explosive cherry)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000 + 6000 (Type 2)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Yo ho ho.</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits from previous tier(s).
<color=black>•</color>When angered, picks up his ammo pack and fires 1 extra cherry every 0.5s.</color>

zombies.name: Giga Football Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Tired of th' spotlight, Giga Football Zombie swapped out his bright red jersey for a pitch-black one that blends into th' night. Unfortunately, th' new look makes him resemble a bank robber more than a footballer. Shiver me timbers!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A linebacker geared for stealth.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000 + 6000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie.</color>

zombies.name: Giga Football-nut Elite Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Emerging from th' depths of an eerie realm, Giga Football-nut Elite Zombie be a living mystery. Batten down the hatches! He embodies being dark, dangerous, and disoriented. Even he can't recall his origins, only that th' past feels like a lucid dream that fades with dawn.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A hardened warrior, fearless in th' dark.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>12000 + 12000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie. Dead men tell no tales.
<color=black>•</color>Regenerates 5% max HP every 3s.</color>

zombies.name: Giga Football-nut Leader Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Right-hand zombie to th' Striker, Giga Football-nut Leader be admired by subordinates and trusted by command. He's loyal, skilled, and confused why commendations never come in th' form of fresh brains.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Tears through th' frontlines with ruthless power. Avast ye! Savvy?

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>200 (bite)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>24000 + 24000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits from previous tier(s). Dead men tell no tales.
<color=black>•</color>Immune to knockback, chill, freeze, and butter.
<color=black>•</color>Bites disable plant healing and make victims receive triple damage for 1s. Blow me down!</color>

zombies.name: Giga Buckshot Leader Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Feared on th' battlefield, beloved off it. Giga Buckshot Leader dazzles troops with his signature trick: Cleave him to the brisket! Hiding bullets in his banner.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Suppressive fire that doesn't cease.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>200 (bite) 80/0.1s (iron pea)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>24000 + 24000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Immune to knockback, chill, freeze, and butter.</color>

zombies.name: Sergeant Michael Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Zombie pop idol and fan-favorite, Sergeant Michael Zombie can't go anywhere without a swarm of screaming fans. Savvy? Thundering typhoons! He's learning new moves not just for his global tour, but to dodge fangirls. Blisterin' barnacles!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Enters in moonwalk with backup dancers.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Enters with 3s moonwalk, then summons 4 Super Dancing Pole Vaulters. Blisterin' barnacles!</color>

zombies.name: Commander Michael Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>At th' peak of fame, power, and performance, Commander Michael Zombie just needs a stage to share his joy with th' world. Thar she blows!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Moonwalks in style, then rallies th' crowd.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Enters with a 3s sliding moonwalk. On reaching 4th column or being blocked, ends moonwalk and then summons 4 Super Dancing Pole Vaulters.</color>

zombies.name: General Michael Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dashing steps, haunting twirls. Th' dance prodigy has outgrown th' Edgar Academy. Avast ye! Now, fresh from Jackson Dance Academy, he's shooting an MV with his bodyguard's help. Don't forget to film his signature 45° bow — if ye survive.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Stylish arrival, dazzling encore.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>12000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Ignores plants for 3s while sliding in with a moonwalk to th' 4th column. Then summons 8 Super Dancing Pole Vaulters.</color>

zombies.name: Sharkmarine-X
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A knockoff developed by a rival of Gfishtus Corps. Splice the mainbrace! It's said to perform identically to th' original, but Gfishtus insists this model leaks.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Edgar's latest mass-produced submarine unit.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Moves swiftly in water lanes, crushing any plants in its path, dealing 500 Damage to anti-crush plants.</color>

zombies.name: Destroyer Sharkmarine
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Flawless" weapons be overrated. A true victory lies in overwhelming missile fire raining from th' skies. This modified mine-layer submarine functions as a mobile underwater missile silo, th' starter of that fire.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Lobs bombs nonstop at th' frontline.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Fires 1 bomb every 1.5s aimed at 2 tiles ahead. Th' bomb explodes like a Jack-in-the-Box explosion but can be shot down if it takes 1000 damage mid-air.</color>

zombies.name: Charger Sharkmarine
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>This turbo-powered sub's sole purpose: Charge into and disrupt enemy lines, creating weak spots for allies to attack. Critics say it sacrifices too much for speed, but Edgar shrugs—"All I need be moving forward, at all costs."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Blitzes th' water lanes at reckless speed.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Rushes down water lane plants with extreme speed.</color>

zombies.name: Boomer Sharkmarine
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' ultimate battlefield dominator, this submarine be th' brainchild of Edgar and Gfishtus Corps. After solving th' missile flooding issue, it's now flawless, except for seaweed occasionally jamming th' propeller.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Rises to bombard th' backline with cruise missiles.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>12000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie. Savvy?
<color=black>•</color>Enters th' field submerged. Surfaces when thar be plants in its lane and stops moving.
<color=black>•</color>While surfaced, fires 2 missiles every 1.5s aimed at th' last column. Th' missile explodes like a Jack-in-the-Box explosion but can be shot down if it takes 1000 damage mid-air or blown away by Blovers.</color>

zombies.name: Narwhalmarine
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Edgar's proudest innovation, designed for maximum acceleration. All crew must pass brutal G-force centrifuge tests. "It's like ten Gargantuars sat on you," says one survivor.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Th' steel spear of th' water lanes.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>12000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Charges at extreme speed, cutting through water lane plants.
<color=black>•</color>Once per unit, 0.3s after its appearance, doubles movement speed of all zombies in a 3×3 area (stackable up to 2 times). Thundering typhoons! Thundering typhoons!</color>

zombies.name: Giga Trident Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Wearing waterproof overalls and wielding a shiny trident, he's ready to fish. Don't forget th' helmet — it's less for protection from plants, more for defense against jealous fishermen.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Throws tridents at your backline.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000 + 3000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>6-9s after entering or when blocked, throws 4 tridents at th' last column.
<color=black>•</color>Each trident causes damage to plants equal to 20% (minimum of 60) of their current Toughness. Batten down the hatches!</color>

zombies.name: Giga Trident-nut Firstmate Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Armed with eye drops and a reinforced Tallnut helmet, he's ready to spear th' catch of th' day, or his rivals.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Ye can't dodge what he targets.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000 + 6000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>6-9s after entering or when blocked, throws 8 tridents at random plants 4 tiles ahead (unaffected by Umbrellas).
<color=black>•</color>Base trident damage +100.</color>

zombies.name: Giga Trident-nut cap'n Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A mighty warrior once slated for forklift duty — until he failed th' helmet size test. So now he simply hurls more tridents, harder. Avast ye! Splice the mainbrace!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Tridents rain down in scattershot.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>12000 + 12000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>6-9s after entering or when blocked, throws 12 cluster tridents.
<color=black>•</color>Splits into 1 extra trident for each plant 4 tiles ahead.
<color=black>•</color>Base trident damage +300.</color>

zombies.name: Netherite Miner Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>With a netherite pickaxe and forged mining license, this zombie set off to strike a coal deal with Queen Endoflame — though Piglin Corp's Wither Skeleton trafficking ring might prove stiff competition.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Fastest digger in th' Nether mines.

<color=black>Toughness: Arrr!</color><color=#4B0082>3000 + 3000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Each attack adds 2000 mining progress to th' plant. If mining progress exceeds th' plant's HP, th' plant be instantly destroyed.</color>

zombies.name: Netherite Driller Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Praised at excavation contests for his lava-fueled netherite drill. Though he always forgets to mention that his hoe be also netherite, th' dedication!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Digs tunnels but gets easily lost.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000 + 6000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Each attack adds 4000 mining progress to th' plant.
<color=black>•</color>Digs underground and his drill cannot be pulled by Magnet-shrooms while underground.
<color=black>•</color>Emerges randomly between columns 2-8.</color>

zombies.name: Netherite Excavator Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Head of th' Zombie's Nether Mining Bureau followed by hundreds of eager, labor-worthy zombies, he dreams of a mining empire. Edgar scoffs: "He just keeps tunneling into other zombies' graves since he's blinded by his helmet. That's why they're always chasing him."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Leads other zombies underground in one big dig.

<color=black>Toughness: Thar she blows! Thundering typhoons!</color><color=#4B0082>12000 + 12000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Each attack adds 8000 mining progress to th' plant.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits from previous tier(s).
<color=black>•</color>Enters underground with broadside non-vehicle zombies. They emerge together later.</color>

zombies.name: Plated Michael Zomboni
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Charge, charge again, crush everything! Th' Zomboni plowed through th' field with unstoppable momentum, until it met th' pond in th' middle of th' lawn.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Disco zombie driving a reinforced vehicle.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Crushes plants. Has an inherit +1 DR value.
<color=black>•</color>Spawns a standard Michael Zombie upon death.</color>

zombies.name: Armored Michael Zomboni
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"We've added more layers to th' front armor!" th' newly refurbished vehicle be now th' pride of Michael Zombie, though he regrets that th' gaps between th' armor layers still aren't wide enough to stuff in more backup dancers.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Michael Zombie's vehicle now includes an extra layer of light armor.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>12000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Crushes plants. Has an inherit +2 DR value.
<color=black>•</color>Spawns a Plated Michael Zomboni upon death. Thundering typhoons!</color>

zombies.name: Colossus Michael Zomboni
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>This vehicle's extremely thick armor has earned it th' nickname "Battleship on Land". Blisterin' barnacles! Lately, Michael Zombie has come up with yet another bold new design: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Swap th' base for treads, install a multi-layer turret, and mount a long-barreled cannon. Batten down the hatches! He believes this will be a truly original invention.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Michael Zombie's vehicle now includes two layers of heavy steel armor.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>24000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Crushes plants. Has an inherit +3 DR value. Batten down the hatches!
<color=black>•</color>Spawns a Armored Michael Zomboni upon death.</color>

zombies.name: Knight Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Don't bother him—he's in love. He's not in th' mood to hear your pessimistic pillage on his romance, and if ye try, you'll be met with an explosively emotional response.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Pogo zombie with a modern explosive-loaded pogo stick. Only slightly magnetic and difficult to disarm. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Thundering typhoons!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000 + 3000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombie traits.
<color=black>•</color>Does not lose pogo stick if knocked back by Umbrellas.
<color=black>•</color>If killed while still holding th' stick, triggers a Jack-in-the-Box explosion.</color>

zombies.name: King Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He once struggled with poor sales of pogo sticks, watermelons, and jack-in-the-boxes. So he consulted Catapult Zombie. "You've got to imagine th' watermelon and jack-in-the-box as one," th' advice went. Judging by th' explosive success, it worked.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Equipped with a single-use charger for his explosive pogo stick.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000 + 6000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits th' traits of Knight Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>If spawned on th' right half of th' field, charges up for 5s and then makes a long leap of about 4 tiles.</color>

zombies.name: Emperor Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After much time, he's finally overcome th' pain of his breakup. Now he's dressed in flashy colors and ready to court a new goddess. He's now pursuing Queen Jill-in-the-Box. Hopefully, his emotional stamina has improved.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>With an upgraded charging system, th' smoke from his explosive pogo stick masks his decoy stand-in.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>12000 + 12000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits th' traits of King Clown-on-the-Pogo Zombie but charging duration be reduced to 0.5s.
<color=black>•</color>Can cheat death if holding his pogo stick.</color>

zombies.name: Kirov Bomber
zombies.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Since top-of-the-line parts aren't windfall, Gfishtus Corps thought it would be cost efficient to make a simplified model for lower scale attacks. Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum! Though ultimately they just made an airship that be uncannily similar to Dr. Zomboss' original model... Thundering typhoons!

- Written by Mr. Etc.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A Kirov airship that periodically drops Jack-in-the-Box bombs.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>500/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie. Yo ho ho.
<color=black>•</color>Crashes after taking 20 hits from Magnetar stars.</color>

zombies.name: Kirov Mothership
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' Kirov mothership be a core product of Gfishtus Corps, and th' company claims it uses cutting-edge drone technology. But if ye examine th' debris of its minions closely, you'll often find "Recycled" painted in red.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>An aerial mothership that deploys Kirovs Drones.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Every 3s, summons a Kirov Drone with 0.1× its own HP.
<color=black>•</color>Crashes after taking 30 hits from Magnetar stars.</color>

zombies.name: Kirov Flagship
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>High-altitude infiltration! Integrated recon and assault! Total firepower coverage! Fully digitalized unmanned combat! Gfishtus Corps proudly presents Kirov 2.0! It's th' ultimate beast, except for th' ridiculously short flight range that relegates it to being a mere frigate under a larger mothership. Arrr! Th' mothership, of course, be sold separately. Blisterin' barnacles! Dead men tell no tales.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>An aerial supremacy that deploys rapid carpet bombers. Arrr!

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>300/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>12000</color>
<color=black>Traits: Thar she blows!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Every 3s, summons 2 Supersonic Bombers to smartly decimate th' lane. Blimey!
<color=black>•</color>Crashes after taking 40 hits from Magnetar stars.</color>

zombies.name: Restless Wraith
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Born into poverty, I was fortunate to be sponsored by a wealthy patron and gained an education. I later served as an upright official, speaking frankly at court. People said th' Emperor was a tyrant, yet though he ignored me counsel, he never punished me. Only later did I learn: Th' Emperor was deaf.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A reanimated spirit that explodes upon death, harming all green life in its wake.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>250 (non-bite)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>When killed by damage, deals 125 damage to all plants in a 3×3 area.</color>

zombies.name: Immortal Wraith
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Th' night wraith soared, scattering all allies. Two plants stood in its path. Enraged, it struck — one fell, and th' other tried to resist. Batten down the hatches! Th' wraith burst forward, piercing both, and finished them off with brutal strikes. Brave they were, but both perished in an instant. What more could they do? Laughable.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A phantasmal spectre that cuts through barriers with ghostly force.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>500 (non-bite)</color>
<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000</color>
<color=black>Traits: Arrr!</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Every 4-8 seconds, dashes forward for up to 2 tiles, ignoring plants and dealing damage.
<color=black>•</color>When killed by damage, deals 250 damage to all plants in a 3×3 area.</color>

zombies.name: Eternal Wraith
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Li Chi-hsing, a native of Fengdu, once said as a boy, "I can see a jade seal thar — it belongs to me family." Everyone laughed. At 24, amid famine, he rose in rebellion and declared himself king of Fengdu. Blow me down! Blisterin' barnacles! When he received th' jade seal, it scorched his face. Blow me down! Th' next year brought another famine. He was ousted, barely escaping with his life. Shiver me timbers! His tongue wounded by th' seal, when asked his name, he could only mumble: "I'm Li..ch.."</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>A wraith that phases through plants and strikes with imperial wrath.

<color=black>Damage:</color><color=#4B0082>300/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: Dead men tell no tales.</color><color=#4B0082>12000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>On th' right side of th' lawn, every 4-8 seconds, phases through up to 4 tiles ignoring plants, reaching as far into th' row as possible and dealing damage along th' way. If nay bypassable plants be present, dashes forward 1 tile instead.
<color=black>•</color>On th' left side, attempting to phase disables this skill.
<color=black>•</color>When killed by damage, deals 500 damage to all plants in a 3×3 area.</color>

zombies.name: Trident Light Hwacha
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"When pear blossoms bloom across th' land, th' river flows beneath soft gauze." Trident Light Hwacha read this ballad in a yellowing book, moved by th' legend behind it. Unfortunately, it did not understand that rockets need engines to fly far.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Unleashes a small wave of tridents. Shiver me timbers!

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 1 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Attacks by firing 4 tridents at once, can reload and fire again once, then resumes moving forward and crushing plants. Tridents land 5-7 tiles ahead.</color>

zombies.name: Trident Medium Hwacha
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Training with th' Trident Medium Hwacha involves unique precision drills. Since th' tridents can't change trajectory mid-air, th' driver must reposition th' entire cart for aiming. Yo ho ho. "Adjust slightly… more… just a bit—" Splash! Th' cart tumbles into a broadside pond.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Unleashes a larger wave of tridents.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>3000 + 3000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 2 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits of Trident Light Hwacha but fires 14 tridents per salvo.</color>

zombies.name: Trident Heavy Hwacha
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A veteran trident warrior, decorated and seasoned, has joined th' Hwacha Division as its newest unit. He has hunted Snowfurs in th' tundra and fought crocodiles in th' swamps. Now he stands before you, ready to battle. Let's see — can ye dodge this? Sling yer hook!</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Unleashes tridents that scatter on death.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>6000 + 6000 (Type 1)</color>
<color=black>Traits: Savvy?</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Tier 3 Evolved Zombie.
<color=black>•</color>Inherits traits of Trident Medium Hwacha.
<color=black>•</color>Upon death, unused tridents scatter randomly within 3.5 tiles in its lane, damaging all plants hit. Sling yer hook!</color>

zombies.name: Sniper Commando Zombie
zombies.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A bounty-hunter turned commando, Sniper Commando Zombie be shrouded in mystery. Nay one knows whar he came from, why he's so serious, or how he intends to eat brains through such a ridiculous barrel.</color>
zombies.info:
<size=36>Punishes your most valuable plants with precision.

<color=black>Toughness:</color><color=#4B0082>1000</color>
<color=black>Traits:</color><color=#4B0082>
<color=black>•</color>Upon entry, targets th' most valuable plant on th' lawn (by Sun cost).
<color=black>•</color>If not eliminated in 8s, kills th' plant and moves onto th' next target.</color>
